name: Natalie Cookson
subject: URGENT PETITION RESPONSE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu2VP0MJVzGP6JSd1fUsMx_o&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191119_eng_s&n=1) Have you been keeping up with impeachment? Not only has President Trump been busy tampering with witness testimony, he’s even suggesting that he wants to testify before Congress! We won’t hold our breath — President Trump will never voluntarily agree to answer questions under oath. [**But on the off chance he WANTS to talk about impeachment, forget written testimony, Mr. President! Answer these questions on the debate stage!**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-sBpUTu90oG7y7sfok76u2ZevSEEdM5WZsy31i69hI8JrB7xurc5bor8A3E6z0fL&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191119_eng_s&n=2) |
---
[**_Should President Trump debate Bill?
_**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-sBpUTu90oG7y7sfok76u2ZevSEEdM5WZsy31i69hI8JrB7xurc5bor8A3E6z0fL&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191119_eng_s&n=3)
| | [YES ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-sBpUTu90oG7y7sfok76u2ZevSEEdM5WZsy31i69hI8JrB7xurc5bor8A3E6z0fL&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191119_eng_s&n=4)
---
**It’s clear that the Republican Party and President Trump are afraid to stand behind their conduct and make their case to the American people.** They’d rather continue to cancel primaries and caucuses, refuse to hold any presidential debates, and hope that nobody notices that **_this is not normal_****.**
**We believe the American people deserve to hear from** **_all_** **of the Republican candidates for president. Truth matters, and we want to know that you’ll support us in this fight.**
[**Will you join us and call on President Trump to debate Bill on the issues?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-sBpUTu90oG7y7sfok76u2ZevSEEdM5WZsy31i69hI-HWDQBSQZzko-WY8zW7F-Z1C9o295TLS8D2BO_Q93Jrg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191119_eng_s&n=5)
---
[**_Should President Trump debate Bill?
_**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-sBpUTu90oG7y7sfok76u2ZevSEEdM5WZsy31i69hI8JrB7xurc5bor8A3E6z0fL&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191119_eng_s&n=6)
| | [YES ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-sBpUTu90oG7y7sfok76u2ZevSEEdM5WZsy31i69hI8JrB7xurc5bor8A3E6z0fL&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191119_eng_s&n=7)
---
— Natalie
_Natalie Cookson_
_Chief of Staff_
_Weld 2020_
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191119_eng_s&n=8).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191119_eng_s&n=9) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191119_eng_s&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191119_eng_s&n=11), software for leaders.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Susan Collins's re-election campaign is falling apart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Susan Collins is just like any other Trump Republican 99 times out of 100, but whenever she's up for re-election, she fakes to the center just long enough to hold onto her Senate seat. Like Lucy with the football, she tries to make us believe that this time, she'll save us and actually be a voice of reason. But when push comes to shove? She puts Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court. She says she's a moderate on immigration? She just voted to elevate the guy who designed Trump's plan to rip immigrant children seeking asylum from their families and put them in cages. People are finally starting to catch on that she's not just going to pull the football out from under us \-- she'll make sure it has a lifetime appointment to slam us in the head, too. She has a job approval rating of just 35% in Maine. She just lost the endorsement of the League of Conservation Voters, which she had in previous elections, because of her capitulation to propping up Trump's anti-environment, climate change-denying, soul-crushing administration. _The Cook Political Report_ has classified her Senate race in 2020 as a "toss-up." This is the MOST VULNERABLE she's ever been. This race in Maine is KEY to Democrats winning back the Senate, so we know Mitch McConnell, bastion of all that's unholy, and the GOP will pull out all the stops and flood Maine with millions in dark money for Republicans to hold onto the majority. But Democrats have an incredible chance this cycle to take down Susan Collins and take back the Senate: her name is Sara Gideon. She's a leader in the fight against climate change in Maine, a steadfast supporter of Medicaid expansion and _Roe v. Wade_ , and she's not about to sell out her values for corrupt corporate sponsorship. 97% of her funding comes from donations of $100 or less. We can flip this Senate seat. We can get rid of Susan Collins and take back the Senate majority from Mitch McConnell. But because Sara is entirely funded by grassroots donations, we can only win if engaged Democrats like you get involved in this race now. [**If you care about getting dark money out of politics, protecting our healthcare access and not letting another Brett Kavanaugh anywhere near the Supreme Court, please fight back against Mitch McConnell and Susan Collins by donating anything, even just $1, today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcd8/6e9863e8/169b282a/1db0ad85/2909875126/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=OUT20191119c.ND&refcode2=hyno0YaHkOAxvi5K6eL7") Your support is critical to Democrats taking back the Senate in 2020. Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcd8/6e9863e8/169b282a/1db0ad85/2909875126/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=OUT20191119c.ND&refcode2=hyno0YaHkOAxvi5K6eL7")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

[Unsubscribe](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcd8/6e9863e8/169b282a/1db0ad84/2909875126/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/unsubscribe")

name: MJ Hegar
subject: we've got the momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
KXAN just reported that -- thanks to this grassroots team -- we're leading the Senate race in Texas.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909cf/7f51f7bc/4bf8f3a1/4ef0afec/1553248445/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | **BREAKING: "Retired Air Force officer and former candidate for U.S. House
MJ Hegar leads the U.S. Senate race**
**in more ways than one. " **
_\-- KXAN Austin_ **[Help us beat Senator Cornyn>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909cf/7f51f7bc/4bf8f3a1/4ef0afe3/1553248445/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txvalues?refcode=email_20191119nd__531__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Peter: _KXAN_ just reported that -- thanks to this grassroots team -- we're leading the Senate race in Texas. Unlike Senator Cornyn, who is in the pockets of corporate PACs and puts Mitch McConnell's agenda over the best interests of Texans, our campaign is about fighting for you -- [**but I need your help to win >>>**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909cf/7f51f7bc/4bf8f3a1/4ef0afe3/1553248445/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txvalues?refcode=email_20191119nd__531__&amount=10&recurring=true")

**Senator Cornyn has nearly $11 million in the bank, so I 'm counting on this grassroots team to keep our momentum.**

**Texas is a _huge_ state**, so it takes a lot of resources to campaign all over and get our message out.

**This campaign can't run without the help of people like you. Can you please make your first donation today to help us beat Senator Cornyn?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909cf/7f51f7bc/4bf8f3a1/4ef0afe2/1553248445/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txvalues?refcode=email_20191119nd__531__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909cf/7f51f7bc/4bf8f3a1/4ef0afe1/1553248445/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txvalues?refcode=email_20191119nd__531__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909cf/7f51f7bc/4bf8f3a1/4ef0afe0/1553248445/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txvalues?refcode=email_20191119nd__531__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909cf/7f51f7bc/4bf8f3a1/4ef0afe7/1553248445/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txvalues?refcode=email_20191119nd__531__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909cf/7f51f7bc/4bf8f3a1/4ef0afe6/1553248445/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txvalues?refcode=email_20191119nd__531__")**

\-- MJ Hegar

name: The Markey Campaign
subject: The fights that define our times
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |

| Team: Ed Markey is on the front lines of the fights that define our times -- the Green New Deal, gun safety, reproductive freedom, immigrant rights, economic inequality -- and Ed is ready to win.

name: Tina Smith
subject: My friend and colleague, Ed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I'm proud to be standing with my colleague, Ed Markey, because he's a leader in the Senate on the issues that matter most. Will you join me?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191119-markey?refcode=em191119-markey&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team,

Now more than ever, we need champions in the Senate fighting for the issues that matter. That's why I've set a goal to raise $5,000 today for my colleague, Senator Ed Markey.

Ed has been a champion and leader on the issues that matter most -- from reproductive health care to protecting our environment -- and now he's up for re-election and we've got to do what we can to keep him in the Senate to keep fighting.

If you care about reproductive rights, tackling climate change, and fighting for economic equality, join me in supporting Ed Markey.

**Will you stand with me and Ed and split a donation today so that we reach our $5,000 goal?** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191119-markey?refcode=em191119-markey&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191119-markey?refcode=em191119-markey&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")

This team has stepped up when it matters most -- that's why I'm coming to you now. Keeping champions like Ed in the Senate is how we keep fighting for progress and getting things done for people in Massachusetts, Minnesota, and all across the country. **There's no better way to show the momentum on our side than through this grassroots movement stepping up to support Democratic leaders committed to fighting for all of us.**

**[We have to come together to stand up for our progressive values and to move our country forward. Chip in now and we'll split your donation between both of our campaigns.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191119-markey?refcode=em191119-markey&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10")**

Thank you,

Tina

clean_body: | | | | Hi team, Yesterday, Tom met the Democratic National Committee’s polling requirement for the December debate by reaching 5% in a South Carolina poll, right behind Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren! Now, we just need to meet the DNC's 200,000 grassroots donor requirement. I know that we can get there. In fact, we only need 1,108 more donors in Pennsylvania. Can you help reach our Pennsylvania goal by chipping in $1 today? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | When Tom talks to people, his message resonates. We’re seeing it all across the country, and we need to keep his voice out there, speaking up about how to get our government back on track. That’s why qualifying for the December debate is so critical. Many thanks, Heather Heather Hargreaves Campaign Manager Tom 2020 If you feel that your information is inaccurate,. | [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]() We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about this movement. If you'd like to learn more about volunteering for Tom's campaign, . If you'd like to stay up to date with Tom on the road, make sure to follow him on , , and . If you'd rather not receive emails from us, you can unsubscribe by clicking == — we'll be sad to see you go! Tom Steyer 2020 · PO Box 626 · San Francisco, CA 94104 · USA

subject: We're counting on you, team

body:
November is a tough fundraising month | |
---
| | [](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9c6/134673f2/9ac07da/6997a94e/1453747550/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_111919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
[**Please take a moment to read a message Michael sent yesterday - it's attached below. As of 5 p.m. we're 753 donations behind where we were at this point last month -- but with your help, we can catch up in no time! We're knocking doors, opening new offices, and hiring more field staff, but we need your help to fuel this people-powered campaign to victory. Can Michael count on you, team?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9c6/134673f2/9ac07da/6997a94e/1453747550/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_111919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Friend: [In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9c6/134673f2/9ac07da/6997a94d/1453747550/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_111919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[There is an incredibly high number of undecided voters in this race.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9c6/134673f2/9ac07da/6997a94d/1453747550/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_111919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Celebrity politicians who've been in the media spotlight for months, or even years, continue to miss the mark.

But the more undecided voters learn about our campaign, the more they like it.

[This month we're pacing behind our October fundraising numbers. With your help, I know we'll catch up in no time.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9c6/134673f2/9ac07da/6997a94d/1453747550/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_111919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[The average online donation to my campaign is $29, but any amount you donate today will help close our November fundraising gap. Can I count on you? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9c6/134673f2/9ac07da/6997a94d/1453747550/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_111919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
I wouldn't be running if I didn't think we could win.

Together we can keep funding ads and building our movement to reach out to the more than 70% of Democrats who haven't made up their mind yet about who they are supporting in this primary.

[We will win this election the same way we always have: by presenting a compelling and unifying vision for our country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9c6/134673f2/9ac07da/6997a94d/1453747550/VEsHBg/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_111919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[I'm not accepting any money from corporate special interest groups, so I'm counting on your support, friend. Our average online contribution is $29 but whatever amount you can afford to chip in today will make all the difference!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9c6/134673f2/9ac07da/6997a94d/1453747550/VEsHAQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_111919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Thank you,

Michael

Earlier this month, billionaire and former Goldman Sachs executive Leon Cooperman (who as recently as 2017 settled with the SEC on insider-trading charges) was brought to tears on live television while discussing the prospect that a President Elizabeth Warren might require him to pay his fair share in taxes.

**[Our response? body:
| | |
---
| Hey there -- We were looking through our records, and here's what we have on file for you: | **Name:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Supporter?** Yes
**Previous Debate Stage Donor?** Not yet!
**Suggested Action:[Chip in $5 before Cory takes the stage to become an official Cory 2020 Debate Stage Donor!](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191119_BHQ_20191119-fr-BHQ-debatednr-ndnrs_ndnrs_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

Because of supporters like you, our campaign has been able to hire additional staff as well as make key investments in the early states -- investments that have helped Cory meet all the debate thresholds the DNC has put before us so far.
But right now, team, we're at a crossroads. The clock is ticking, and Cory still hasn't qualified for the December debate. We need to grow our grassroots campaign to 200,000 unique donors and hit 4% in at least four qualifying polls to get Cory on stage.
Debates allow for a grassroots campaign like ours to break through. That's why we're reaching out today, because we need your help to make sure Cory doesn't miss the next one.
**[Will you chip in $5 to become an official Cory 2020 Debate Stage Donor and help Cory make the December debate stage?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191119_BHQ_20191119-fr-BHQ-debatednr-ndnrs_ndnrs_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
We can do this, together.
Booker HQ

name: Steve Chabot
subject: under attack
body:
Today’s Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn’t get further to the left, today’s Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide.

No Images? Click here https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdhkqhl-kujkulhluu-a/

Friend,

Imagine a world in which staunch defenders of the truth are targeted for intimidation by an angry mob online.

Imagine a world where conservative champions are shouted down... just for having the courage to stand for what is right.

That is what is happening to my friend and colleague Congresswoman Elise Stefanik right now.

STAND FOR THE TRUTH [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stefanik/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_1234567_20191119_stefanikha1_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_5] DONATE NOW [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stefanik/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_1234567_20191119_stefanikha1_steve_hfm&utm_content=2_5]

Last week, Congresswoman Stefanik asked tough, important questions during the Democrats' impeachment hearings. She demanded the truth. She exposed the hyper-partisan nature of their charade.

Since then, the liberal mob have fixated on Congresswoman Stefanik. They're pumping millions of dollars into her opponent's campaign and relentlessly attacking her online.

Some of these radical liberals have even called her “trash.”

This is how the Left reacts when their hypocrisy is exposed. They try to silence fighters for the truth.

I NEED YOU RIGHT NOW to join me in supporting Rep. Stefanik. It's our job as conservatives to help stand for the truth and counteract the reprehensible behavior of the liberal mob.

DEFEND STEFANIK [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stefanik/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_1234567_20191119_stefanikha1_steve_hfm&utm_content=3_5] CHIP IN [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stefanik/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_1234567_20191119_stefanikha1_steve_hfm&utm_content=4_5]

I want to make sure other conservatives don't look back on the events of this past week and decide not to speak out.

That’s why I’m going to send a portion of every dollar raised from this email directly to Rep. Stefanik’s campaign.

Her opponent has raised almost $2 million off of this liberal hysteria... we need to counter that!

Will you chip in anything you can right now, to defend those who aren’t afraid to speak out for the truth? [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stefanik/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_1234567_20191119_stefanikha1_steve_hfm&utm_content=5_5]

–Steve Chabot

6613 Glenway Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. Like https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jdhkqhl-kujkulhluu-f/ Tweet https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jdhkqhl-kujkulhluu-z/ Forward https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jdhkqhl-l-v Preferences https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jdhkqhl-961825B2-kujkulhluu-e | Unsubscribe https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jdhkqhl-kujkulhluu-s/

subject: Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
I’m here with Zach.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3307%2E377263%2EoKKVnG) Yang Gang --

I’m here in Atlanta preparing for tomorrow’s debate.

I promise to do everything I can to show everyone why you’re so committed to this movement, what we’re fighting for, and how we’re going to take this campaign all the way to the White House.

Zach’s with me and gave me an update on our goal of hitting a number of contributions before the debate starts tomorrow. Right now we’re falling a bit short.

So I wanted to reach out and see if you could help, Yang Gang. **We still have 10,263 contributions to go to hit our goal. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: re: Peterson Air Force Base
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Cory Gardner didn't speak out when the Trump administration took money from a Colorado Air Force base for the White House's border wall - Colorado deserves better. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377145b/691c9bd/6f86f014/11a7e715/3284731534/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

When we learned that $8 million dollars had been diverted away from Peterson Air Force Base for President Trump's border wall, I was outraged--like a lot of Coloradans.

Now, according to a new report, it looks like Cory Gardner wasn't even working to protect the funding, nor was he even in touch with military officials at Peterson to let them know what was coming.

**Gardner 's desperate efforts to curry favor with Donald Trump have real consequences for our state and country.**

Those taxpayer funds were appropriated to our military here in Colorado. The fact that Cory Gardner is standing by and letting those resources go to President Trump's border wall is shameful.

[**_Will you sign our petition today and remind Cory Gardner that he works for the people of Colorado, not for Donald Trump?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377145b/691c9bd/6f86f014/11a7e712/3284731534/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVFWTlVUa0ZOUlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/tell-cory-gardner-to-step-up?source=em_pet_20191119_JH_20191119-pet-JH-peterson-2mo_2mo_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377145b/691c9bd/6f86f014/11a7e713/3284731534/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVFWTlVUa0ZOUlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/tell-cory-gardner-to-step-up?source=em_pet_20191119_JH_20191119-pet-JH-peterson-2mo_2mo_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326") I can promise you that as your Senator, I would have done everything in my power to stop this. I'll always put Coloradans first.

Thank you,
John

---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218

clean_body: Cory Gardner didn't speak out when the Trump administration took money from a Colorado Air Force base for the White House's border wall - Colorado deserves better. | | | "" | Team, When we learned that $8 million dollars had been diverted away from Peterson Air Force Base for President Trump's border wall, I was outraged--like a lot of Coloradans. Now, according to a new report, it looks like Cory Gardner wasn't even working to protect the funding, nor was he even in touch with military officials at Peterson to let them know what was coming. Gardner 's desperate efforts to curry favor with Donald Trump have real consequences for our state and country. Those taxpayer funds were appropriated to our military here in Colorado. The fact that Cory Gardner is standing by and letting those resources go to President Trump's border wall is shameful. "" "" I can promise you that as your Senator, I would have done everything in my power to stop this. I'll always put Coloradans first. Thank you, John | | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 3 must-see moments from Impeachment, Day 1,033
body:
The Washington Swamp often likes to think they alone run our country, with input from voters serving, at most, as a pesky inconvenience. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a619591d32&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 19, 2019
---
| | |
# **3 must-see moments from Impeachment, Day 1,033**

**The Washington Swamp** often likes to think they alone run our country, with input from voters serving, at most, as a pesky inconvenience. That’s why House Democrats and their “star witnesses” keep claiming, day after day, that President Donald J. Trump is somehow at odds with America’s “stated foreign policy.” By America’s, they mean their own.

**Let’s be clear** : The President, duly elected by the American people, is the one who sets the foreign policy of the United States. Career bureaucrats and political appointees, while entitled to their own opinions, do not. That’s how constitutional democracies work.

**Yet during hours and hours** of hearings that have effectively shut down Congress this month, Americans are being treated to just that: opinions. Every single time House Republicans ask the witnesses for any actual evidence of crimes or impeachable offenses committed by the President, none is offered. That’s because those crimes don’t exist.

**Today’s hearing** followed the same script. Alexander Vindman—who testified for hours on national TV—has never met the President, said that he has no way of knowing what the President was thinking on Ukraine, and admitted that his testimony was based on nothing more than his own personal opinions and feelings.

**America learned nothing new**. A few witnesses, Vindman included, actually _confirmed_ the accuracy of the [White House call transcript](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=20c1959c13&e=3ee4985eea) between President Trump and President Zelensky. Vindman even acknowledged the corruption surrounding Burisma and that Hunter Biden didn’t appear qualified to serve on the company’s board, leaving the door open for a potential conflict of interest.

**Most important for Americans** outside the Beltway Swamp, it’s been more than 1,000 days of Democrats’ nonstop impeachment and investigations. Every hour wasted staging TV infomercials for the left is another hour that Congress isn’t passing a budget, isn’t approving USMCA to fix NAFTA for American workers, isn’t addressing our broken immigration system, isn’t working to lower medicine prices, and isn’t working for you.

**With that in mind** , here are 3 moments that tell you everything you need to know:
1. [Rep. Adam Schiff invents fake quotes from President Trump—again!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c0ff8baf47&e=3ee4985eea)

2. [Reminder: The President sets foreign policy, not unelected staff.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9363b1b68f&e=3ee4985eea)

3. [President Trump: While Democrats did nothing, America created _$11 trillion_.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ee47567418&e=3ee4985eea)

---
|
---
|

|

name: Nancy Mace
subject: I got FOIA'd
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR CONGRESS**
body:
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
[](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdhktytk-uuffjdtr-i/)
| | | Beating National Democrats To The Punch Friend, **Somebody is scared**. _National Democrats know I’m going to be the nominee, and the greatest threat to Joe Cunningham and Nancy Pelosi keeping SC-01 in their hands_. I almost laughed out loud when I heard what they were already up to. People I told couldn’t believe they’re doing this, but the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) submitted a Freedom Of Information (FOIA) request to The Citadel asking for any and all records of me as a college student. That’s right. _They want to know everything I did when I was 18 in a sad attempt to use hateful personal attack ads against me._ This is really pathetic, not to mention a huge invasion of my privacy. **But it’s also not gonna work.** _I’m a single, working mom with two jobs to support two kids. The Left appears it will stoop to any level to hurt me and my family, digging for dirt all the way back to my teenage years_. So, I have to ask, _how far back would the DCCC like to go? How personal do they want to get? How much time do they have?_ Like most of us, I’ve done some dumb stuff in my life, so we could be here a while. _I wasn’t the perfect daughter growing up. I wasn’t the perfect wife. Don’t tell my kids this, but I’m not the perfect mom. Everyday I try to do my best, but even on my best day, I’m still not perfect. And anyone who tells you they are is being dishonest._ But I’m pretty sure whatever they think I did when I was 18 shouldn’t be relevant to my fitness for office.

**I promise one thing - I’ll fight. I’ll fight hard. But I won’t resort to petty smear jobs personally attacking anyone, ever.** **_I call on Joe Cunningham and the Democrats to do the same_.** Of course Joe is gonna have a hard time saying that. While I’ve never gone after my opponent in a personal way, Joe Cunningham’s campaign has attacked me and belittled my career and my successes here in the Lowcountry. _I believe my ideas, my experience and my bipartisan approach to issues are a winning combination for the Lowcountry; this is what matters to voters and this is where I will continue to focus._ But Democrats don’t want to fight on that ground. Instead, _they are hell bent on finding as much dirt as possible to attack me on a personal level because _they can’t win on policy_._ This says a lot more about them than it does about me.

**Turns out the law actually doesn’t require The Citadel to release my records the way the Democrats were hoping. That’s ok.** **I’m going to do them a favor and help them**. You want to see what I did when I was 18?_I’ll release it myself_. _While I don’t think it’s relevant, I also have nothing to hide_. **So, I requested any and every record The Citadel has and I am releasing all of it[ _HERE_](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdhktytk-uuffjdtr-d/)**. There is nothing legally requiring me to do so because all of these records are protected by law under FERPA; The Citadel won’t release them._I am even including personal, medical information_. I just wish they still had my disciplinary records. I once got in trouble for a clean room and remember I told a senior to “f*** off” one time because he had a history of harassing me to the point of tears. I’m sure there’s more. I’d love to see these for old time’s sake. And I guess Joe Cunningham would too. **So, here's his chance._Have at it_**. _I broke a glass ceiling when I became the 1st woman to graduate from The Citadel. And I’m going to break another when I become the 1st female Republican from South Carolina ever elected to Congress. And I’m going to do it in the 1st Congressional District. There is no way in hell I am going to let the DCCC or Joe Cunningham degrade me during one of the toughest times in my life_. _What the Democrats are trying to do to keep this seat is why people hate politics._ **It’s time to teach Joe Cunnningham, Nancy Pelosi and the DCCC a lesson about attacking Republican women**. **Help me fight back: **_[https://secure.anedot.com/nancy-mace-for-congress/donate](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdhktytk-uuffjdtr-h/)_. Sincerely, Nancy Mace **P.S.** \- I redacted my SSN and the names of individuals in the documentation. _**That’s it**_.
---
---
[](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdhktytk-uuffjdtr-k/)
**[Website](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdhktytk-uuffjdtr-u/) | [Facebook](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdhktytk-uuffjdtr-o/) | [Twitter](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdhktytk-uuffjdtr-b/) **| _[**Donate**](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdhktytk-uuffjdtr-n/)_
**PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR CONGRESS**

name: MAJOR UPDATE (via Margaret Good for Congress)
subject: Our opponent doesn’t want you to read this
body:
Friend,
We’re proud to announce that EMILY's List has just endorsed our campaign!
EMILY’s List plays a critical role in electing pro-choice, Democratic women across the country, so we couldn’t be more excited about this endorsement. Especially because so much is at stake.
Here in Florida’s 16th district, our current representative has voted against women’s healthcare in Congress time and time again. Vern Buchanan has joined Trump and his Republican colleagues in the House in their nationwide attacks against abortion rights, life-saving healthcare services at Planned Parenthood, and so much more.
We can’t wait to replace him with pro-choice Democrat, Margaret Good. But we need your help: will you join us in our campaign to reinstate women’s rights in Congress? Donate $5, $10, or whatever you can NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emilys-list?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.20]
From Alabama to Missouri, we've seen what happens when we allow anti-choice Republicans like Buchanan to remain in office. EMILY's List is fearlessly fighting to ensure Americans have the health care they deserve and representatives who will actually defend their rights.
That’s why we are so honored they chose Margaret to lead the charge for reproductive freedom in FL-16.

clean_body: Friend, We’re proud to announce that EMILY's List has just endorsed our campaign! EMILY’s List plays a critical role in electing pro-choice, Democratic women across the country, so we couldn’t be more excited about this endorsement. Especially because so much is at stake. Here in Florida’s 16th district, our current representative has voted against women’s healthcare in Congress time and time again. Vern Buchanan has joined Trump and his Republican colleagues in the House in their nationwide attacks against abortion rights, life-saving healthcare services at Planned Parenthood, and so much more. We can’t wait to replace him with pro-choice Democrat, Margaret Good. But we need your help: will you join us in our campaign to reinstate women’s rights in Congress? Donate $5, $10, or whatever you can NOW >>> [] From Alabama to Missouri, we've seen what happens when we allow anti-choice Republicans like Buchanan to remain in office. EMILY's List is fearlessly fighting to ensure Americans have the health care they deserve and representatives who will actually defend their rights. That’s why we are so honored they chose Margaret to lead the charge for reproductive freedom in FL-16. Friend,
This month, we saw voters in Kentucky and Louisiana speak loud and clear: just because a state might be red in the past, doesn’t mean it’s going to stay that way. And if there’s one message that can’t be ignored, it’s that Democrats in red states can win.
The nation is paying attention, and we have the momentum going into 2020. And just like those campaigns in Kentucky and Louisiana, our race to beat Republican governor Jim Justice is high stakes.
These first few weeks of our campaign will set the tone for the next 11 months. Can you pitch in today to get us running strong out of the gate? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamben]
Our campaign is focused on bringing people together to move West Virginia forward. In order to do that, we must defeat Jim Justice in 2020.
A $35 contribution right now will send a message that you’re standing with us as we fight to move our state forward.

clean_body: Special interest groups are going to do everything in their power to defeat us and keep the status quo in our district. = Team, We’ve said it from the beginning, but it is now more clear than ever before: Special interest groups are going to do everything in their power to defeat us and keep the status quo in our district. **One of the most popular Republican dark money groups, American Action Network, just announced that they’re spending $7 million on ads in swing districts across the country -- and protecting Scott Perry in PA-10 is one of their top priorities. Our grassroots campaign is making special interests groups like this take notice. They’re worried about the growing movement of people taking a stand against this kind of smear politics.**Team,** we need to show them we’re up for a fight. = Unlike Scott Perry, Eugene doesn’t have millions of dollars from dark money and special interest groups pouring into his campaign. But what we do have is people like you, team. We can flip PA-10 blue, butwe can’t do it without your support. ** | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Since the Washington Post, National Journal, Roll Call, and Cook Political Report all list PA-10 as one of the most vulnerable seats for Republicans in the entire country, we know this is just the beginning of even more dark money and special interests groups throwing their money behind candidates like Scott Perry in order to maintain the status quo. Let’s show them what a powerful grassroots movement looks like! = Thank you for being a part of this fight. \--Team Eugene Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit . | Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10 DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. With your support, we’d like to try something a little different this month.
Thanksgiving comes late this year, and we don’t want to bother you with fundraising email after fundraising email. If we raise $3500 today, we will skip the rest of our fundraising series this month .
With 2020 around the corner, we need to make sure we have a full war chest. There are a lot of promising Democrats in Tennessee that will need our support. From volunteer training to phone banking, we are going to have their backs. Will you join us right now by making a donation?

On Sunday, November 24, Donald Trump Jr and Fox News' Kimberly Guilfoyle will join Congressman Greg Gianforte and Susan Gianforte for a very special reception in Helena. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53536134:Wsc2M8vYN:m:1:1494336505:B83969056393F25ADCEB57473E04DE6A:r)
---
Friend - You're invited!

On Sunday, November 24, Donald Trump Jr and Fox News' Kimberly Guilfoyle will join Congressman Greg Gianforte and Susan Gianforte for a very special reception in Helena.

**[_Would you like to come_?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53536134:Wsc2M8vYN:m:1:1494336505:B83969056393F25ADCEB57473E04DE6A:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53536134:Wsc2M8vYN:m:1:1494336505:B83969056393F25ADCEB57473E04DE6A:r)
The general reception will take place from 7:30 pm to 8:30 pm at the Montana Club and parking will be available in the garage across the street. Tickets are $250 a person. **[Reserve your ticket by following this secure link](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53536134:Wsc2M8vYN:m:1:1494336505:B83969056393F25ADCEB57473E04DE6A:r)** or contacting Courtney Thomas at [Courtney@GregforMontana.com](mailto:Courtney@GregforMontana.com), call/text: 406.594.0904

Greg and Susan, Kimberly and Don Jr., look forward to seeing you this Sunday!

Thanks,

Team Gianforte

P.S. If you cannot make this event but would still like to support Greg's campaign for Governor, **[you can chip in here!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53536135:Wsc2M8vYN:m:1:1494336505:B83969056393F25ADCEB57473E04DE6A:r)** Thanks for your support!

| [** RSVP Now >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53536134:Wsc2M8vYN:m:1:1494336505:B83969056393F25ADCEB57473E04DE6A:r)

| Dear Derek, I’m reaching out to you today because I just signed up to become a member of the **NHGOP Grassroots Circle.** The NHGOP has been working hard to rebuild the party to make sure we are ready to take on the Democrats in 2020 - and I, like you, am committed to its collective success. That’s why I am leading the way in new signups for this vital program. name: Tom Szymanski, Campaign Manager
subject: Fwd: Call for help from ALL 87 MN counties!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
This is a quick follow-up. Jason wrote you the other day about our urgent goal, trying to receive one donation from each of Minnesota's 87 counties, and we’re close now.
Fellow Conservative, This is a quick follow-up. Jason wrote you the other day about our urgent goal, trying to receive one donation from each of Minnesota's 87 counties, and we’re close now. After running the numbers, your county is one of the few counties we have not yet received a donation from! Your generous donation of $8.70 today will put us over the top! **[Will you help put us over the top?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/205675b131a4255d/340a47ab93b58e52c3d6b838967d376c/33183)** Jason’s running to take back Minnesota from the radical socialists like Ilhan Omar and Senator Tina Smith, and support President Trump in the Senate against this impeachment hoax. However, he can’t do it alone. We need EVERY conservative on board to sustain our efforts. Help Jason expose Tina Smith’s true colors, and share his vision for a stronger America and a stronger Minnesota. **[Tap or click here to make a secure contribution](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/205675b131a4255d/f1ada31b31fb796cc3d6b838967d376c/33183).** Tom Szymanski
Campaign Manager, Jason Lewis for Senate [ Contribute $8.70 here >>> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/205675b131a4255d/e6a22c5a695c9987c3d6b838967d376c/33183) | |
---
From: Jason Lewis
To: Tom Szymanski, Campaign Manager
Date: Friday, November 15, 2019 10:03 AM
Subject: Call for help from ALL 87 MN counties!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/205675b131a4255d/1a96d368fe578180c3d6b838967d376c/33183)
Tom,

We have big plans over the next 45 days... and we have a simple request today to keep our efforts on track.

**[Will you chip in $8.70 to help us expose Tina Smith’s radical-left agenda?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/205675b131a4255d/b40898e887fc20f4c3d6b838967d376c/33183)**

We have 87 counties in Minnesota, and today we’re just looking for at least ONE supporter from each county to chip in. That’s all it will take to meet our immediate online shortfall.

_Every dollar we raise will help us reach voters and build our conservative momentum!_

**[Tap or click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/205675b131a4255d/ab3881f22cc69508c3d6b838967d376c/33183)** to be the first supporter from your county to respond!
[ Contribute $8.70 here >>> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/205675b131a4255d/1187f72f0942d2d7c3d6b838967d376c/33183)
You know what’s at stake in 2020, Tom. Today’s Democrat establishment is led by people like impeachment cheerleaders Ilhan Omar and Tina Smith, who represent the extreme views of the coastal elites like Nancy Pelosi and AOC – NOT the values and priorities of common-sense Minnesotans!

**We can WIN this U.S. Senate race, and help re-elect President Trump. But we can’t do it without committed conservatives across Minnesota on board.**

I’m anxious to see where people step up to help. Again, we’re just looking for one supporter from your county to meet our goal.

**[Be one of 87 Minnesotans to help keep up the fight to TAKE BACK Minnesota from the socialist Democrats!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/205675b131a4255d/fb4b7d1f8acf7f98c3d6b838967d376c/33183)**

\- Jason

[ Contribute $8.70 here >>> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/205675b131a4255d/4fb721766ee6e675c3d6b838967d376c/33183)
|

|

| | | Peter,

The desperate and dishonest Democrats' public impeachment spectacle is underway... and it's clear that NOTHING has changed.

**They have NO credible witnesses and NO hard evidence!**

It's more apparent than ever what this is all about: They want to destroy President Trump at any cost - and they're willing to shred the hard facts, due process, and the Constitution that are standing in their way.

Coach isn't mincing words. This fight over impeachment boils down to good vs. evil.

If you agree, **[rush YOUR support today to stand with Coach and President Trump!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=4bd7a9c69096c085e881f8b98c09f0f79eccab9e68d86eae9b59381653c3c9e50bcb424f6d93b0a2a2ff0e41e28fc88a4c96419dea9ed334 "rush YOUR support today to stand with Coach and President Trump!")**

_They 're no longer able to steal all the money from taxpayers like they have in the past!_

President Trump needs as much support as possible right now, and Coach is the ONLY candidate in this race tough enough to stand alongside him.

**[Donate $5, $10, $20, or $50, or more if you can, to show President Trump that Alabama has his back!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=5ebb0b999310eb4055e449fcb336dee9f095131a1b570b5bb60e0fb3edeb01a771c58f469651753412a4d006724dbddb6fcf7fadf30df62a "Donate $5, $10, $20, or $50, or more if you can, to show President Trump that Alabama has his back!")**

We win elections when we have solutions that are big enough to meet the challenges that people face in their lives. Because fear and complacency don't win elections; hope and courage win elections.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Republican witnesses turn on Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Yesterday, Kurt Volker and Timothy Morrison \-- two Republican witnesses \-- revealed even deeper evidence of the key roles Trump and his mega-donor / EU ambassador Gordon Sondland played in extorting Ukraine. Did House Republicans acknowledge that their own star witnesses confirmed the whistleblower's complaint? Of course not. They demonstrated just how low they will stoop to protect Trump (though it's hard to imagine them stooping any lower): They attacked the credibility, loyalty, and patriotism of a decorated Purple Heart recipient. They repeatedly pushed false claims about the Bidens even when their witness testified that there was nothing to these stories. They even tried to expose the whistleblower publicly in flagrant violation of accepted procedure and law. The Republican spin machine has been wasting no time in trying to warp public perception and spread its lies. We've got to fight back. We're running a rapid response poll, and we need to hear what voters like you think of these new developments NOW: **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcc1/6e9863e8/1694baea/1db0af7a/3308085421/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/I71lQuwW") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcc1/6e9863e8/1694baea/1db0af7a/3308085421/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/I71lQuwW") Thank you in advance for your feedback \-- we couldn't do this work without you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcc1/6e9863e8/1694baea/1db0af79/3308085421/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191120a.ND-b&refcode2=yMcfrlFfeQBbhZyYok2s")

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Peter, don't tell me. Show me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

Iowa has a rich history of welcoming immigrants with open arms.

Late Republican Governor Robert Ray welcomed Tai Dam refugees from Vietnam, Laos, Burma, Cambodia, and Thailand to Iowa. To those who disagreed with him, he said: “Don’t tell me of your concerns for these people when you have a chance to save their lives. Show me. Don’t tell me how Christian you are. Show me.”

Steve King has shown where he stands -- and it's not on the side of our shared values.

King has compared immigrants to hunting dogs. He's called Dreamers -- children who were brought to this country through no fault of their own and have since started small businesses, gone to school, and served in our military -- drug mules.

And he's questioned the value of minorities entirely.

I believe we have a responsibility to keep our country's promise to Dreamers and immigrant families. I will continue to stand up to Steve King or anyone else who uses hate and xenophobia in an attempt to divide neighbors and friends.

**[Will you stand with me and sign the petition calling on the Senate to pass the Dream and Promise Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12058305/123555574/-2045634982?mscode=em19_191120_scholtendacapt&refcode=em19_191120_scholtendacapt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWFkN2M3Ny1kMDBiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G33XjFqqnw4gRyevnPBtqYxIwr3qgGVawQD1-3-SGsY=&emci=f6b294db-b80b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1ead7c77-d00b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12058306/123555575/-2045634982?mscode=em19_191120_scholtendacapt&refcode=em19_191120_scholtendacapt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWFkN2M3Ny1kMDBiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G33XjFqqnw4gRyevnPBtqYxIwr3qgGVawQD1-3-SGsY=&emci=f6b294db-b80b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1ead7c77-d00b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)
It’s not right that the fate of hundreds of thousands of immigrants is in the hands of the Supreme Court. We made a promise -- and we must uphold it.

**Our immigration system should match who we are: it should reflect our values and enable our country to reach its greatest economic heights. Immigrants don’t hold us back; they empower us.**

**[Sign the petition demanding the Senate put the Dream and Promise Act up for a vote. We need to stand tall with our Dreamers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12058307/123555576/-2045634982?mscode=em19_191120_scholtendacapt&refcode=em19_191120_scholtendacapt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWFkN2M3Ny1kMDBiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G33XjFqqnw4gRyevnPBtqYxIwr3qgGVawQD1-3-SGsY=&emci=f6b294db-b80b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1ead7c77-d00b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12058308/123555577/-2045634982?mscode=em19_191120_scholtendacapt&refcode=em19_191120_scholtendacapt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWFkN2M3Ny1kMDBiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G33XjFqqnw4gRyevnPBtqYxIwr3qgGVawQD1-3-SGsY=&emci=f6b294db-b80b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1ead7c77-d00b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)

You can also connect with the campaign on social media: Like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12058310/123555579/-579313244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWFkN2M3Ny1kMDBiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G33XjFqqnw4gRyevnPBtqYxIwr3qgGVawQD1-3-SGsY=&emci=f6b294db-b80b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1ead7c77-d00b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013) or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12058311/123555580/-1912497674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWFkN2M3Ny1kMDBiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G33XjFqqnw4gRyevnPBtqYxIwr3qgGVawQD1-3-SGsY=&emci=f6b294db-b80b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1ead7c77-d00b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013). name: Team MJ Hegar
subject: Which of these two options would you choose?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We're asking you to make an important decision.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909cb/7f51f7bc/4bfac968/4ef0907b/3525317524/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter --

By joining this team, you've made it clear that you care about protecting and expanding our health care, taking on climate change, and ending gun violence -- **and defeating Sen. Cornyn once and for all.** MJ is the candidate who can win: Austin _KXAN_ just reported that **"MJ Hegar leads the U.S. Senate race in more ways than one."**

But if we want to keep MJ's momentum building, then we need you to make an important decision right now: **Will you choose Option 1 or Option 2?**
* **[Option 1: Pitch in to this campaign right now.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909cb/7f51f7bc/4bfac968/4ef0907a/3525317524/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191120.1nd__530__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
If you choose this option, we'll be able to invest in building our team and sending MJ across Texas to meet voters. We'll build a campaign that can WIN on November 3, 2020, and send Senator Cornyn packing. Texans will finally have a Senator who fights for them: MJ Hegar.

* **Option 2: You decide not to donate, hoping that somebody else will.**
You assume that other people will step up, but everyone else assumes the same thing, and we start missing important fundraising goals and losing the momentum we've worked so hard to build together. We run the risk of six more years of Senator Cornyn.

Here's the deal: As a combat veteran and Texas tough fighter, MJ **_can_** beat entrenched incumbent Senator John Cornyn -- but it won't happen without an outpouring of grassroots support. **So will you choose Option 1 and help us build the Texas-sized campaign we need to win?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We're asking you to make an important decision. | "" | | Peter -- By joining this team, you've made it clear that you care about protecting and expanding our health care, taking on climate change, and ending gun violence -- and defeating Sen. Cornyn once and for all. MJ is the candidate who can win: Austin KXAN just reported that "MJ Hegar leads the U.S. Senate race in more ways than one." But if we want to keep MJ's momentum building, then we need you to make an important decision right now: Will you choose Option 1 or Option 2? "" If you choose this option, we'll be able to invest in building our team and sending MJ across Texas to meet voters. We'll build a campaign that can WIN on November 3, 2020, and send Senator Cornyn packing. Texans will finally have a Senator who fights for them: MJ Hegar. Option 2: You decide not to donate, hoping that somebody else will. You assume that other people will step up, but everyone else assumes the same thing, and we start missing important fundraising goals and losing the momentum we've worked so hard to build together. We run the risk of six more years of Senator Cornyn. Here's the deal: As a combat veteran and Texas tough fighter, MJ can beat entrenched incumbent Senator John Cornyn -- but it won't happen without an outpouring of grassroots support. So will you choose Option 1 and help us build the Texas-sized campaign we need to win? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" Thank you, Team MJ "" | MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. | | | | | |

| Patriot,
What the Democrats are doing to our President and our country is unwarranted and divisive. They are sore losers who don't know how to handle a loss. From the Russian Hoax to the Ukraine Joke, they've gone through President Trump's first term with one accusation after the other. None of these claims have been able to stick, so they continue forward with impeachment without facts.
Because of the dire circumstances surrounding our President, four Patriots have proposed an enticing offer to boost President Trump's Defense Fund. These patriots have offered to match all donations made TODAY so I have to ask, are you a true Patriot? name: Cory Booker
subject: Joe Biden. Elizabeth Warren. Bernie Sanders. Pete Buttigieg. Kamala Harris. Amy Klobuchar.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey friend, I'm writing to you from Atlanta, where my team and I are finishing some last-minute debate prep before I take the stage tonight. I couldn't be more excited, friend. Once again, I will have the opportunity to share our campaign's message with a national audience, and that's not a responsibility I take lightly. But, here's the thing: So far only six candidates -- Joe Biden, Elizabeth Warren, Kamala Harris, Bernie Sanders, Pete Buttigieg, and Amy Klobuchar -- have qualified for the December debate. _**I am not one of them.**_ I can't help but think, _**what if this debate is my last?**_ **I hope to make you proud on the debate stage tonight, and I hope to make you proud at the December debate too.[Will you chip in to help me get there?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191120_CB_20191120-fr-CB-morning-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** My team tells me we're fewer than 14,000 donors away from hitting the 200,000 individual donor threshold, and we have a plan to reach undecided folks in the early states to hit the polling threshold as well. We're getting close, but we will only meet these requirements if we all step up at this moment. **[So I'm asking -- will you chip in just $1 to become one of the donors who secures my spot on the December debate stage? I don't want tonight to be my last chance to be up at the podium.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191120_CB_20191120-fr-CB-morning-actives_ndnrs_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks for stepping up,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191120_CB_20191120-fr-CB-morning-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d24/5fca0d19/791f80f3/291c43ca/3125497818/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d24/5fca0d19/791f80f3/291c43c9/3125497818/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d24/5fca0d19/791f80f3/291c43c8/3125497818/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d24/5fca0d19/791f80f3/291c43d7/3125497818/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d24/5fca0d19/791f80f3/291c43d6/3125497818/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d24/5fca0d19/791f80f3/291c43ca/3125497818/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

body:
We must do everything we can to make sure Mark is able to run a rock-solid reelection campaign.

clean_body: We must do everything we can to make sure Mark is able to run a rock-solid reelection campaign. | | | Derek -- Donald Trump is already targeting Virginia. And Mark's opponents are working hard to hold onto -- and increase -- the Republican majority in the Senate. They hope to continue blocking legislation that would expand quality healthcare, improve election security, and reduce gun violence. It's critical that Mark is reelected so that he can continue fighting for Virginians and build on the gains we made in 2019. One of the best ways you can help is by making a recurring donation to help Mark build the grassroots organization we'll need to turn out voters and win in 2020 and beyond. Will you make a recurring donation now so Mark can build a strong reelection campaign and continue to fight for Virginians in Washington? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" Remember: in his last run for the Senate, Mark led by a significant margin in the polls but ended up defeating his opponent by less than 1%. It's also worth noting that Mark will be the only statewide candidate on the ballot in 2020. So the stronger his campaign is, the more he'll be able to help other Democrats in Virginia -- including candidates for Congress and even the presidency. We must do everything we can to make sure Mark is able to run a rock-solid reelection campaign. And while Mark appreciates all contributions, recurring donations strengthen the campaign by allowing it to plan for the long term. **I need to raise $70,000 in the next 10 days**.

Friend,

**We recently passed the midpoint of 4th and final fundraising quarter of the year**. From the time that I announced my campaign to take on the Republican establishment, and keep Georgia’s 7th District in Republican hands, more than 13,000 patriots have contributed to my campaign. **Without such support, I would have had to drop out months ago**.

Now, the year is coming to a close and **my primary race is reaching a critical point in time** : Am I going to be able to continue raising the necessary funds to keep pace with the Party’s preferred candidates – who can self-fund – _or are we going to come up short?_

My campaign to be the 2nd-ever black female Republican member of Congress wouldn’t have even been possible without the support of generous donors like you, Friend. Now, with the end of the year coming into focus, **[I’m asking from the bottom of my heart if you would open up your wallet to help me continue the fight.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=f2d65fdc73d743229dd597e4e1c7045a&_e=sjMKrutwW71q2Y_XFAbAlZ8HWitDtqP93Fl2UWIlL5mUtjFOBC0AM8EdWeaGme_UbCQ9vHLfF9vqtD7kUtP9c-BgTVvHo0Vqc898AQZHGoLdu4t21goDfUEf6ry7amDxJZ7Pzk5VxlS9ASVHNyEmaGRVqX4BluEqW1FXQdQA93ZwFU533hNUA2XhD-aVxvJ8R8_Y6M93x0-dQ_yuGFrkDk1s0suiXhZ6N0X9XiIpBl5mURS1BrFCg4QxmNFJZfrnowGrDzVHx314k259eNPeqxQC-JYMtkLJJrgNkvsSxSVKyAWP-mf46xQBmb9S4Iqj)**

To remain competitive in my race, **I need to raise $70,000 in the next 10 days**. Are you able to help me chip away at that figure today?
| [**Donate $10 »**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=f2d65fdc73d743229dd597e4e1c7045a&_e=sjMKrutwW71q2Y_XFAbAlZ8HWitDtqP93Fl2UWIlL5mUtjFOBC0AM8EdWeaGme_UbCQ9vHLfF9vqtD7kUtP9cxiOBf-Ff0KmRGh8UaP1OW7TRiFmesChsRIfoODlGi6KpIdm-fejZaU06OU1KEa47wgE8sujmGA-_H1CGh20wMbi7QGjC5HuNUYaEnJZA3fZFmUpwIoRSiNlvl2e9hkWqxAo57AU30QDVHlRanDGJz61Kdgq5NUkNxoJK2qQWzUOwdU0uInV5Gz5GCh1nuwAZVde9ZIfs9Cio4HNUwipMUSDxGfuFG7J_s0wTKrDeSvs7BsarKYAejT90Zos8NykEQ%3D%3D)

I read the feedback that my campaign receives from these email solicitations, and I realize that **I’m a stranger from Georgia who is asking you to take a chance on the unknown**.

So, if you haven’t heard what my voice sounds like, haven’t followed me on social media, or even read one of my emails in some months, take a moment to watch my recent segment on One America News Network!
[](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=f2d65fdc73d743229dd597e4e1c7045a&_e=sjMKrutwW71q2Y_XFAbAlZ8HWitDtqP93Fl2UWIlL5mUtjFOBC0AM8EdWeaGme_UbCQ9vHLfF9vqtD7kUtP9c-BgTVvHo0Vqc898AQZHGoIZ4YvxIG6DHAEFkpYdbLk5vopZcyiJdxdnk3E03RhwJ2-Z8UAX-RRA_1KHPxMr9YSByh2YrEYTQ3IppVwLwVgRHwTkzs0zhQ7UAxBEmbGyGrbwhi5ZLeL7hz6lsQd_quNtkIdiQmpTslSKUJ_27G3UnPSb-QovkOuycL13wtHbgrdnpHomqZgcxaxoRGYvRLEJ-YH_SwNv2SPOLdWx0aVn) [**WATCH ME DISCUSS MY CAMPAIGN ON OAN! »**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=f2d65fdc73d743229dd597e4e1c7045a&_e=sjMKrutwW71q2Y_XFAbAlZ8HWitDtqP93Fl2UWIlL5mUtjFOBC0AM8EdWeaGme_UbCQ9vHLfF9vqtD7kUtP9c-BgTVvHo0Vqc898AQZHGoJzajEui7aNZ99u7P8Ylgtw2vJWpzfS7KzuxKD93bCby7QF7F0x5tm702-Gebe32vUfSHzGAJ0n_urN88VH-eoemm1mfqqG2eILBieXzR6nXr1ouNighkpTAjzxqyg0CZ5GaIuG002u842MnWGtiX6XEd97MzrXWqm1li7SMHpRKNreiMaa9-ac4GrEZZRUDqUeq1A2IU7iPXUonD9BwSdA)

I’m running for Congress to prove false the inaccurate perception that African American voters won’t vote Republican.

I’m running to be a congressional ally of President Trump! He needs re-enforcements! When I get there, I will:
* Take on AOC and the “The Squad”
* Fight for prison reform
* Work to find a solution to the border crisis PUT AMERICA FIRST

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: Get Big Money Out of Politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica for US
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MpeQ3kdYd03zAqnnjxkJYPI8cI7DAtXn9sLXYDOw8_8=/RGGWWXu53pgAeMC7a81OQSPQI2zp93nrNZSS2XYQBOk=)

Dear Supporter,
We're Winning!

For 17 years, I have served the state of North Carolina in some capacity, and I will continue to do so as a state Senator and next November, as a United States Senator. We have been ahead in the polls since June and we will continue to lead in the polls with your ongoing support!

That's the story, friend. WE. You, me, our friends and families who wish to return public service to the US Senate. Thom Tillis, and his cronies are all bought and sold. How else could you defend a criminally corrupt man like Donald Trump unless you were being paid to do so? Thom Tillis can't even support North Carolina military families, diverting $80 million from our military bases to a wall. A WALL?!

**Our campaign is your campaign**. We haven't spent any money on advertising. Our message is getting out to the masses thanks to hard work, canvassing, and YOU. [**Your $5, $10, $20 donations**](https://act.myngp.com/el/MpeQ3kdYd03zAqnnjxkJYPI8cI7DAtXn9sLXYDOw8_8=/RGGWWXu53pgAeMC7a81OQSPQI2zp93nrNZSS2XYQBOk=) will ensure that our message continues to reach the masses. We are not being fueled by 20 New York Billionaires. It is being fueled by YOU.
Thank you!
Erica

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MpeQ3kdYd03zAqnnjxkJYPI8cI7DAtXn9sLXYDOw8_8=/RGGWWXu53pgAeMC7a81OQSPQI2zp93nrNZSS2XYQBOk=)

{{Authorized and Paid for by Erica for US .}}

---
| | Donald Trump is in town today -- and we need you to help us send a message loud enough for him to hear!- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Y'all, Donald Trump is in town today -- and we need you to help us send a message loud enough for him to hear! [](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_november?refcode=DAV_EM_FR_191120_TrumpVisit_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_FR_191120_TrumpVisit_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_FR_191120_TrumpVisit_U1_X1") Trump is here to try and claim credit for the creation of Austin jobs -- **but we know that it 's the thousands of Texans who want to stand up for their communities who are responsible for bringing opportunity to our state, _not_ him.** Texans are fed up with Trump and the GOP's reckless policies which help giant corporations and billionaires and _harm_ the everyday Americans who are struggling in silence as it gets harder and harder to get by -- _**and we 're ready to fight back at the ballot box in 2020!**_ **Trump knows that if he loses Texas, he has no hope of keeping the White House.** That's the real reason he's personally visiting right now -- _and that 's why national Republicans are pouring resources into competitive races like this one to make sure this state stays RED!_ [**This is OUR state and WE are the ones who will decide who represents us and our values. Will you pitch in right now to help elect a _real_ Texan and send Trump a message that we know who truly has our back?**](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_november?refcode=DAV_EM_FR_191120_TrumpVisit_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=2+-+This+is+OUR+state+and+WE+are+the+ones+wh&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_FR_191120_TrumpVisit_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_FR_191120_TrumpVisit_U1_X1") | | | [Donate $25 ->](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_november?refcode=DAV_EM_FR_191120_TrumpVisit_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=3+-+Donate+25+rarr&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_FR_191120_TrumpVisit_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_FR_191120_TrumpVisit_U1_X1")

name: Margaret Good
subject: EMILY’S List! This is a big deal!
body:
This morning our team shared our GOOD news with you -- secure.actblue.com/donate/emilys-list?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.20_PM [secure.actblue.com/donate/emilys-list?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.20_PM]
Friend,
This morning our team shared our GOOD news with you – that EMILY’s List endorsed our campaign!
EMILY’s List is dedicated to empowering and electing pro-choice, Democratic women. As one of the key players in successful campaigns across the nation, we could not be more proud to have their endorsement!
When members like our anti-choice opponent, Vern Buchanan, who consistently votes against women’s healthcare, remain in office, all of us lose.
Women are running and winning! But we are still in the minority – only 23% of Congresspeople are women. After a record breaking year in 2018, women hold more seats than ever before – but, we still have lots more work to do. Join our campaign today if you agree women deserve more say in our political discourse >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emilys-list?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.20_PM]
Help elect a pro-choice champion to Congress by joining our grassroots army and making a contribution to our campaign today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emilys-list?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.20_PM]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emilys-list?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2019.11.20_PM _5]
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emilys-list?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2019.11.20_PM _10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emilys-list?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2019.11.20_PM _25]
Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emilys-list?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_2019.11.20_PM _50]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emilys-list?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.20_PM _other]
With your support, we’re going to defend women’s healthcare with everything we have.
Thank you!
Margaret

To be removed from this email list, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/3fa4573e-ad0b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68/172d1a0a-dd0b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzJkMWEwYS1kZDBiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T9b6VuR9u32Ycy80jT9AbFjcNup5qzd9GHpMF5c10fY=&id=113801977&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .
