name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: ...then why the hell are we Democrats?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Democrats shouldn't be the party of giant corporate interests or the champions of billionaires and millionaires. We are the party that fights for public schools because every child deserves access to a quality education. We fight for affordable housing because housing is a human right. We believe that opportunity shouldn't be dependent on which family you're born into, but available to everyone. **That 's the American dream.** [**DONATE**](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191120_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b1_castro_all") **If we 're not going to fight for everybody to have a place at the table, then why the hell are we Democrats in the first place? ** A campaign for President of the United States that doesn't include everyone - including those who aren't funding your campaign - isn't worthy of the Democratic nomination. [This campaign will not leave anyone behind. Chip in now to make sure that our People First campaign can continue to grow:](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191120_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+This+campaign+will+not+leave+anyone+behi&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b1_castro_all") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Gary Peters
subject: an update on what's happening in Washington
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
American people deserve one thing above all else: the truth.
| | |
---
Friends,
When it comes to what's happening in Washington right now, the American people deserve one thing above all else: the truth. For the sake of our country - and really, our democracy - we must uncover all the facts and get to the full truth.
It is clearly wrong for a president to pressure a foreign government to help him in an election by holding up critical military aid. But we must bring all of the facts together to get a complete picture of what happened.
That's why recent actions from a number of Republican leaders give me serious pause. Some of my GOP colleagues aren't just turning a blind eye to the president's questionable behavior - they're emboldening him. And this should never, ever be the case.
I'll always fight on the side of justice over partisanship, and I'll support efforts that lead to the facts. **That's why I'm hoping to get your input today:**
**Do you support efforts by Congress to hold Donald Trump and his administration accountable?**
| | | [Yes](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "http://surveys.signforgood.com/gp-trump-accountability?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk98-su-nd")

Today we're at a critical moment for our country. We saw bombshell testimony coming out of Washington this morning, further implicating the president in the Ukrainian bribery scandal. But at home, we're dealing with _another_ scandal involving our current congressman as he comes under criminal investigation by the Department of Justice.

We need to clean house, Peter.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Why Dems are so Worried After Latest Round of Impeachment Hearings
body:
"With signs that Americans are tuning out the impeachment hearings, the clock is ticking on Democrats’ chance to make their case." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ce17174437&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Why Dems are so Worried After Latest Round of Impeachment Hearings**

“With signs that Americans are tuning out the impeachment hearings, the clock is ticking on Democrats’ chance to make their case. Pelosi is clearly worried, telling fellow Dems it’s a ‘weak response’ to ‘let the election decide’ whether President Trump should be removed,” Michael Goodwin writes in the _New York Post_.

The letter seemed strange on Monday when Pelosi sent it to her colleagues, the editors write, “but Tuesday’s hearing more than justified her fear and desperation.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f6ed6fd669&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “While Democrats have spent the last three years practicing the politics of personal destruction, President Trump has been delivering results for the American people. Nearly 7 million jobs created. The lowest unemployment rate in 50 years. Transformative tax cuts for hardworking American families. More than 150 conservative judges confirmed”—and the list goes on, Sen. Thom Tillis (R-NC) writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5949a01e11&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “People are still waiting for Democrats to deliver on their impeachment ‘scandal.’ In week two of the impeachment investigation, the case is firmly closed — Democrats are trying to impeach President Trump for merely doing his job,” Jenna Ellis writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=001c8d36e7&e=3ee4985eea) _,_ listing three big things we learned from the hearings.
---
|
---
| President Trump today “will tour Austin’s Apple manufacturing facility with the company’s CEO Tim Cook. On the campaign trail in 2016, Trump said, ‘I’m going to bring jobs back. I’m going to get Apple to start making their computers and their iPhones on our land, not in China.’” Now, after trade reform and business tax cuts, Apple has begun making more products here in America, Phil Prazan reports for [KXAN](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aa3bfd14cb&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

clean_body: "With signs that Americans are tuning out the impeachment hearings, the clock is ticking on Democrats’ chance to make their case." | | | | | | | Why Dems are so Worried After Latest Round of Impeachment Hearings “With signs that Americans are tuning out the impeachment hearings, the clock is ticking on Democrats’ chance to make their case. Pelosi is clearly worried, telling fellow Dems it’s a ‘weak response’ to ‘let the election decide’ whether President Trump should be removed,” Michael Goodwin writes in the New York Post. The letter seemed strange on Monday when Pelosi sent it to her colleagues, the editors write, “but Tuesday’s hearing more than justified her fear and desperation.” | | “While Democrats have spent the last three years practicing the politics of personal destruction, President Trump has been delivering results for the American people. Nearly 7 million jobs created. The lowest unemployment rate in 50 years. Transformative tax cuts for hardworking American families. More than 150 conservative judges confirmed”—and the list goes on, Sen. Thom Tillis (R-NC) writes in . | | “People are still waiting for Democrats to deliver on their impeachment ‘scandal.’ In week two of the impeachment investigation, the case is firmly closed — Democrats are trying to impeach President Trump for merely doing his job,” Jenna Ellis writes in the , listing three big things we learned from the hearings. | | President Trump today “will tour Austin’s Apple manufacturing facility with the company’s CEO Tim Cook. On the campaign trail in 2016, Trump said, ‘I’m going to bring jobs back. I’m going to get Apple to start making their computers and their iPhones on our land, not in China.’” Now, after trade reform and business tax cuts, Apple has begun making more products here in America, Phil Prazan reports for . | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Evelyn Yang
subject: He’s ready, I hope you are too.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Let’s send him onto the debate stage with momentum

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3321%2E377263%2Ee4XR7a) Yang Gang --

Hello from Atlanta!

Soon, I’ll be heading over to Tyler Perry Studios -- the site of tonight’s Democratic debate -- to cheer on my husband, Andrew.

I’ll be spending some time with Andrew backstage before the debate starts. He’s ready to take the stage, but I want to give him some good news before he goes out there.

**[We’re making a final push to reach our goal of 750,000 donations before the debate tonight, and we still need 6,237 more. Only you can help us close the gap -- please donate $10 or more to our campaign now.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17300?t=5&akid=3321%2E377263%2Ee4XR7a)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17300?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=3321%2E377263%2Ee4XR7a)

When I first joined Andrew on the road, I had no idea what it’d be like -- and time and time again, I’m overwhelmed by the Yang Gang’s passion, creativity, and love for my husband. I love the Yang Gang. You guys keep him going.

**You have no idea how much your support means to us.**

Tonight’s debate is an opportunity to broaden the Yang Gang even more. Andrew’s going to make his case and show the nation why he’s **the** candidate who can defeat Trump next year and successfully lead our country in a new direction.

**[So let’s prove to the world that Andrew has the strength of the Yang Gang behind him tonight -- donate $10 or more now to help us reach our goal of 750,000 contributions before 9 PM ET.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17300?t=7&akid=3321%2E377263%2Ee4XR7a)**
[Donate Now](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17300?t=6&akid=3321%2E377263%2Ee4XR7a)

I can’t wait to watch Andrew tonight with all of you. Please send us good vibes and wish Andrew only the best luck.

Thanks for everything you do for our campaign,

Evelyn Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Donate Now](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17300?t=14&akid=3321%2E377263%2Ee4XR7a)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Sondland's testimony could be the turning point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Gordon Sondland, current ambassador to the European Union, is testifying publicly today about his role in pressuring Ukraine to investigate the Bidens. Sondland helped finance Trump's inauguration and in turn Trump gave him a prestigious ambassadorship he was unqualified for. He served as a key go-between for Trump and the Ukrainian government in their effort to strong-arm Ukraine into fabricating charges against the Bidens. Now, he may be one of those closest to Trump to flip, exposing first-hand knowledge of Trump's guilt. Congressional Republicans are going to try every trick in Mitch McConnell's book to confuse the public and twist the evidence, so we need to hear NOW from engaged Democrats like you: **Does Trump deserve to be impeached?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcc3/6e9863e8/1696cafb/1db0af42/1903626336/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/XzrK77Ut") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcc3/6e9863e8/1696cafb/1db0af42/1903626336/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/XzrK77Ut") Thank you so much for your response \-- your feedback is critical in helping us set our strategy for taking back the White House in 2020. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcc3/6e9863e8/1696cafb/1db0af41/1903626336/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191120b.ND-b&refcode2=NFdh78POUM8OnIrp7t3z")

subject: Brindisi: Wrong for Upstate New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
We voted for President Trump in 2016, but now our Congressman is sitting by while Democrats try to impeach him. Enough is enough. [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=a54ebea52abe41ed95b2b7650c4cad37&_e=VNyyfpfE64BmhbheyrDS2S1P_uaRawDYtJaxnd7XEXmefNn8X958Fd-4O1vDMwK_MWErc0B_xaqACKshAJtaEpiNPV-twnO1YrCPXIU9HY3QfuHGTvJlfWZNAWzRFM3Px_c_vSiA7lyZPt5gKB2Zq_4-q4V9FIaLph7Yj7O5e0cfUTTRH4jxbxJOqznbWhiSg4RvjV5wh3e6d3exSaMbdYgpGLzqrE5Rv1YodseaIRS9ToTGt1ki7AG0aZfsZa1ot5fvEpudhZ3E-8nuaR0n0JC5i073gs3kbpORIuZB2YNC_6dbDPfy5YjkKw3qxunT6kAqYPPxJVgquvaszrL-3xDx58bGruij8uxE6EV5UEMzAq6wO0VCYChTRu6-3rAc1QjjAyF4mLU3m_5cZ0kF2jARBqQrcumAYUZ672FCSAF8VQCvMcXb99_Oq9enqR4K0MZY1DR2tTkbuwfeJlVWJQ%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter, this is getting out of control.

**Democrats have started their second week of scam impeachment hearings. **

So far, we’ve seen NO EVIDENCE from the radical left and their disastrous witch hunt about any of their baseless claims. Make no mistake: this entire “whistleblower” stunt is going to blow up just like the Left’s collusion hoax.

It’s shameful that our Anthony Brindisi supported this witch hunt and sided with radical Washington liberals over the people in our district.

**Upstate New York deserves someone who fights for us in Congress. Stand with President Trump now. **
[ **Stand with Trump** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=a54ebea52abe41ed95b2b7650c4cad37&_e=VNyyfpfE64BmhbheyrDS2S1P_uaRawDYtJaxnd7XEXmefNn8X958Fd-4O1vDMwK_MWErc0B_xaqACKshAJtaEpiNPV-twnO1YrCPXIU9HY3QfuHGTvJlfWZNAWzRFM3Px_c_vSiA7lyZPt5gKB2Zq_4-q4V9FIaLph7Yj7O5e0cfUTTRH4jxbxJOqznbWhiSg4RvjV5wh3e6d3exSaMbdYgpGLzqrE5Rv1YodseaIRRwhS-9d3P126nz1eEvVpTHhdvyT2TrRwUQ7lHF6rMF6-wECwkKxsEK6ucJjq7Tc_2j5XWlW7CK6c7dDNzQ-H8QUhBZ5ZFFILvYsjErotv8u4eDv9ekFsMKOxNBGIdqJmhJjO7Bx1YOkTa1QpefezZClK7RIlE1menkAh8GhprfdMuKIE5-GknV25wGQpZ3_Vdk-bEKfLp55ZtkKUnt5x8m3Krgaj6CKuTxH25vN6sJzw%3D%3D)
It’s crystal-clear that Anthony Brindisi is out-of-touch with Upstate New York.

He’s worked with Governor Cuomo to give Spectrum a monopoly over our area and drive up the price of your cable bill. Now, he is pretending to fight for you to distract you from the fact that he voted to continue these impeachment hearings against President Trump.

Peter, let’s show Anthony Brindisi that we’re tired of this crazy witch hunt. **[Denounce Anthony Brindisi and stand with President Trump now.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=a54ebea52abe41ed95b2b7650c4cad37&_e=VNyyfpfE64BmhbheyrDS2S1P_uaRawDYtJaxnd7XEXmefNn8X958Fd-4O1vDMwK_MWErc0B_xaqACKshAJtaEpiNPV-twnO1YrCPXIU9HY3QfuHGTvJlfWZNAWzRFM3Px_c_vSiA7lyZPt5gKB2Zq_4-q4V9FIaLph7Yj7O5e0cfUTTRH4jxbxJOqznbWhiSg4RvjV5wh3e6d3exSaMbdYgpGLzqrE5Rv1YodseaIRSv6jvwrt4vCZDFMWDu3e76wPChX5tYsgOVZzuhyUV2TO_-sdUU7E4wE3V8HC-WYGzw8Bvos35WVqnVpAySWqjYT3k7wWSZ0MDp9WkpDz2IVZ5PsCJ5lYrNDbg3gV3l928W2pNjdCxWv-y9soy3LaAyKbPgTk6KjT9b5nlq9snfG6fqYiAqc5KflGq8-uhn2zhz7wDvtAqU-BQTkjqWpq2o6iMTYlwD0BM03BjNUfEiUg%3D%3D)**

When I’m elected to Congress, I’ll stand up for President Trump and work on the issues important to you, not Washington liberals.
[ **Stand with Trump** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=a54ebea52abe41ed95b2b7650c4cad37&_e=VNyyfpfE64BmhbheyrDS2S1P_uaRawDYtJaxnd7XEXmefNn8X958Fd-4O1vDMwK_MWErc0B_xaqACKshAJtaEpiNPV-twnO1YrCPXIU9HY3QfuHGTvJlfWZNAWzRFM3Px_c_vSiA7lyZPt5gKB2Zq_4-q4V9FIaLph7Yj7O5e0cfUTTRH4jxbxJOqznbWhiSg4RvjV5wh3e6d3exSaMbdYgpGLzqrE5Rv1YodseaIRSnUYJG4vbr9BHmG3biAQco9KttUBLAMLV_DBX-Igi0tScf260f3pzqcddP9CApAiWVU8Jb_ovodIy8yGfzjH6rdcQNvqn7ZbPhpd3rMTUmgQYYQ0DBqtisSpyoHIdXM99mG5NwJ8orEh1ihkCx_R5tSu5X3dgo_I1LL47Ubspb_iJScNBf82T5V20B1kRPW6H4NeBuJxIPMmaLmzPtBPis7st9HpRx9WljH8xPTfezzw%3D%3D)
Thanks for your support,

Claudia Tenney

name: Christina Finello
subject: Finishing up November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress |
body:
Hi Peter!

November is a busy month for me and my family, as I’m sure it is for yours. After hustling to help Democrats win big in our local elections earlier this month, I’ve been putting in the hours to get my clinical psychology license recertified, going to local Democratic meetings to meet with the members, and wrapping up the girls’ soccer season, and on top of getting ready for the holiday season!

No matter how hectic my schedule gets though, I’m determined to do what it takes to win this race, so we’re still plugging away to raise the resources we need to reach our November goal. We’re trying to get ahead on fundraising and wrap up as much as possible before Thanksgiving, but we’re still $2,630 short of where we need to be by the end of this week if we’re going to turn this last red seat in the Philly suburbs blue.

We can win here, just like Hillary Clinton, Gov. Tom Wolf, Sen. Casey, and all of the other Democrats who flipped the Bucks County government just a few weeks ago. But, unlike my Republican opponent, I’m not taking any corporate PAC money, so we can’t afford to fall short here and face cutting any of our plans to win.

If you want us to have a fighting chance at flipping this seat, I need you to pitch in $25 or whatever you can right now.

Counting on you. Here’s the link to give: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finelloforcongress**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12063248/123606002/2063951955?refcode=CFN20191120&refcode2=J8gx6vALywSbsbbYon7H&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODMwYzg5Yy1lOTBiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jIA5QA4BO5p07v37V2NREjd5zTdKELx9Iq2uo2y1I58=)

Thanks,
Christina

name: Molly Keenan
subject: FWD: Add your name: Demand climate leadership from Wednesday's debate.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We have to do this together.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-climate-debate?utm_source=ema_2019-11-20_debate-2&source=ema_2019-11-20_debate-2&utm_campaign=debate-2&utm_medium=ema&t=3&akid=7990%2E868730%2E3CPSs5) Friend, Tonight's the DNC debate -- and we won't know how much time is going to be focused on climate until it's over, but we know one thing for sure: **_There were zero questions about climate during the last debate._ And certainly not enough time focused on climate in the debates before that, either.** [**This will only change if we come together and demand it: Add your name today to demand climate leadership from the DNC and the Democratic presidential candidates ahead of tonight's DNC debate.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-climate-debate?utm_source=ema_2019-11-20_debate-2&source=ema_2019-11-20_debate-2&utm_campaign=debate-2&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=7990%2E868730%2E3CPSs5) Thanks -- fingers crossed climate has a better night tonight. Molly \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Tuesday, Nov 19, 2019
Subject: Add your name: Demand climate leadership from Wednesday's debate Friend, "No, you are not closing with an Ellen question." "This question about Ellen is so stupid." "Tonight's proceedings are sounding like a convincing argument that there really should be a dedicated climate-change debate." Those were some of the reactions after last month's DNC debate concluded --_without a single question about climate change,_ but a dedicated question instead on Ellen DeGeneres. Don't get me wrong, I think Ellen is great. But the failure of the DNC and the media to give the climate crisis the time and attention it demands should make everyone reading this email furious. These debates shouldn't be about entertainment for entertainment's sake -- they should be a serious conversation about our future. **There's another DNC Democratic Debate happening tomorrow, and we need to know that climate will be a focus for the candidates _and_ the moderators.** [**Add your name next to mine to call on the DNC and all the 2020 candidates to make climate change a priority in Wednesday's debate.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-climate-debate?utm_source=ema_2019-11-20_debate-2&source=ema_2019-11-20_debate-2&utm_campaign=debate-2&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=7990%2E868730%2E3CPSs5) | [ADD YOUR NAME!](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-climate-debate?utm_source=ema_2019-11-20_debate-2&source=ema_2019-11-20_debate-2&utm_campaign=debate-2&utm_medium=ema&t=6&akid=7990%2E868730%2E3CPSs5)
---
Look, we already know there's too much at stake here to step back, but there's even more on the line right now than usual:
Last week, President Trump's nominee to lead FEMA said, and I quote: "The climate has changed. I cannot attribute the scientific reasons why."
With wildfires raging in California and the East Coast still recovering from multiple historic hurricanes this year, we know that the climate is changing -- and we know exactly why. FEMA's job is to respond to these disasters -- how can they do that if it's led by someone who denies the science of our climate crisis?
To me, that is certainly a more pressing issue than Ellen DeGeneres. I hope, maybe, this time the DNC agrees.
[**Add your name next to mine to demand that climate is a focus on Wednesday's debate stage -- because we deserve more from candidates, moderators, AND from our party leadership.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-climate-debate?utm_source=ema_2019-11-20_debate-2&source=ema_2019-11-20_debate-2&utm_campaign=debate-2&utm_medium=ema&t=7&akid=7990%2E868730%2E3CPSs5)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[ADD YOUR NAME!](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-climate-debate?utm_source=ema_2019-11-20_debate-2&source=ema_2019-11-20_debate-2&utm_campaign=debate-2&utm_medium=ema&t=8&akid=7990%2E868730%2E3CPSs5)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Here's why I'm running
body:
I hate the Swamp, but we have to fight for our kids' future. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/this-impeachment-drama-is-hurting-america-1523865?e=90fad69796)
---
| | [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=ca3a6f18e2&e=90fad69796)
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=c85fb69fe6&e=90fad69796)
---
| | Peter,

I've been in Congress before. The Swamp is awful.

It's full of people who say they support one thing but then sell out their principles for an easy time.

So why am I choosing to run again? Because I love my God, family, and country. All three are under attack from the Democratic Party. We can’t sit back and let it happen.

I know that my 13 grandkids deserve better than the Squad.

**[They deserve better than tyrannical socialism that will ruin the economy and prevent hard-working Iowans from living a simple, middle-class life.](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=b6bedef043&e=90fad69796)**

That's why I'm running, because I want to fight for my and your kids, the entire next generation, and ensure the American dream is still around for them.

It's going to be hard work, but I think we can do it. Flipping Democrat-held seats like IA-02 is the first step. We need a conservative House if we are going to stem the tide of socialism in America.

[**Will you donate just $5 to help us match liberals dollar-for-dollar and get our message of freedom out there?**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=dc75ed92b2&e=90fad69796)

[**Any amount helps, even just $5 can make the difference between a voter hearing about our campaign or not.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=aab162809c&e=90fad69796) Thank you for investing in the next generation. We have to protect the American Dream for them.

For Iowa,

Bobby Schilling

name: Team Monika
subject: Question for you, friend:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Tell us--why do you support Monika?

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d90d/7dfbb003/42ac4082/5527b5af/2083595476/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191120_em_storyshare&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=rtw_20191120_em_storyshare&source=rtw_20191120_em_storyshare")
---
Hey friend--you joined this campaign at its foundational stage, when we're building up our resources and our people's platform.

Your opinion is really important to how we move forward from here.

One of the most critical qualities of a people-first representative is how in touch they are with the people they work for. Because when it comes down to it, that's what it means to be a public official: You work for the _people._

[**So can you tell us: Why do you support Monika? Click here to add your name to Monika 's Official Supporter List and tell us why you're on this team.**](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d90d/7dfbb003/42ac4082/5527b5ac/2083595476/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://monika.bsd.net/page/s/story-team-monika?refcode=rtw_20191120_em_storyshare&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=2+-+So+can+you+tell+us+Why+do+you+support+Mo&utm_campaign=rtw_20191120_em_storyshare&source=rtw_20191120_em_storyshare") [I'M ON TEAM MONIKA](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d90d/7dfbb003/42ac4082/5527b5ad/2083595476/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://monika.bsd.net/page/s/story-team-monika?refcode=rtw_20191120_em_storyshare&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=3+-+IM+ON+TEAM+MONIKA&utm_campaign=rtw_20191120_em_storyshare&source=rtw_20191120_em_storyshare") Is it because you're sick of empty promises? Or is it because of Monika's strong record on fighting for families, women and survivors?

All of the answers will be recorded and compiled to help us build this campaign's platform and connect with voters. And of course, we're looking forward to sharing your response with Monika!

Thank you,

Team Monika
---
| | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. For Monika Johnson-Hostler, serving people is about integrity, and that's what she'll bring to Congress. [CONTRIBUTE](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d90d/7dfbb003/42ac4082/5527b5a2/2083595476/VEsC/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191120_em_storyshare&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=4+-+CONTRIBUTE&utm_campaign=rtw_20191120_em_storyshare&source=rtw_20191120_em_storyshare")

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Susan Collins & Mitch McConnell
body:
She's ranked #2.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f3d/4bef7a87/6bc73848/287ff34a/1218829114/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
_Morning Consult_ released a list of the most unpopular Senators in the country. Susan Collins is #2:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f3d/4bef7a87/6bc73848/287ff349/1218829114/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMTktZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-nov-imgtst?refcode=em191119-full")
It's no surprise that these two are back to back here. Mitch McConnell and Susan Collins have been working as a team to push Donald Trump's right-wing agenda through the Senate.
Mainers have clearly had enough. They're ready for a leader who puts their needs _first_ - and Sara Gideon is the right person for the job.
**But beating Susan Collins won 't be easy. Collins' special interest donors will spend outrageous amounts to help her campaign. We need to be prepared to fight back - so that's why we ask:**
[**Make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign today. We have to be prepared to fight back against any attacks thrown our way.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f3d/4bef7a87/6bc73848/287ff349/1218829114/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMTktZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-nov-imgtst?refcode=em191119-full")
Unlike Susan Collins, we're not taking any money from corporate PACs, so we're depending on small-dollar donations to keep us going.
You've always had our back - because of your support, we outraised Susan Collins last quarter! - so we know we can count on you now.
All our best,
\- Team Sara

name: Opinion Research Team
subject: You've been chosen: 2020 Strategy Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

Ten Democrats will take the debate stage tonight. Michael has recently polled higher or tied with half of them.

While the DNC continues its attempts to artificially winnow the field by blocking qualified candidates with arbitrary rules, created in back rooms, our campaign is gaining traction in swing states across the country.

We are building this momentum by bringing grassroots supporters like you into the fold. It's the issues that most affect you that inform and shape our campaign.

[That's why you've been chosen to participate in our new 2020 Strategy Survey.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9c3/134673f2/9ae418d/6997aa16/2775895078/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/2020-strategy-survey?source=EM_SURV_B1_112019_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

As we get closer to the first vote in this primary, understanding your top priorities is absolutely crucial to forming our campaign strategy.

name: Greg Stanton
subject: RE: tonight's debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
In tonight's Democratic debate, you're going to hear a lot from the candidates about their vision for the future of our country.

**I will personally be listening for what the candidates have to say about the urgent issues impacting Arizona families, including combatting climate change, investing in our infrastructure, supporting public education, and protecting our healthcare.**

For far too long, the concerns of Arizonans have not been centered in Presidential campaigns. But if the eventual nominee wants to turn out the new voters necessary to win Arizona in 2020, they need to speak to the issues that matter to our state.

[**Will you chip in to my Turn-Out-The-Vote Fund to help me ensure that Arizona voters hear about the issues they care about in 2020?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/D6-Ta-r1RNiO9lAaK5hW41nEpEOMtSdhLsmCsIQsgM8=/qCkL2muhx97F_bLMiSvsloPB0QzwRwLceDW09hAcczc=?refcode=X_112019_TOTVFund_H&amount=25.00&recurring=auto)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/D6-Ta-r1RNiO9lAaK5hW41nEpEOMtSdhLsmCsIQsgM8=/qCkL2muhx97F_bLMiSvsloPB0QzwRwLceDW09hAcczc=?refcode=X_112019_TOTVFund_H&amount=5.00&recurring=auto) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/D6-Ta-r1RNiO9lAaK5hW41nEpEOMtSdhLsmCsIQsgM8=/qCkL2muhx97F_bLMiSvsloPB0QzwRwLceDW09hAcczc=?refcode=X_112019_TOTVFund_H&amount=25.00&recurring=auto) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/D6-Ta-r1RNiO9lAaK5hW41nEpEOMtSdhLsmCsIQsgM8=/qCkL2muhx97F_bLMiSvsloPB0QzwRwLceDW09hAcczc=?refcode=X_112019_TOTVFund_H&amount=50.00&recurring=auto)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/D6-Ta-r1RNiO9lAaK5hW41nEpEOMtSdhLsmCsIQsgM8=/qCkL2muhx97F_bLMiSvsloPB0QzwRwLceDW09hAcczc=?refcode=X_112019_TOTVFund_H&amount=100.00&recurring=auto) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/D6-Ta-r1RNiO9lAaK5hW41nEpEOMtSdhLsmCsIQsgM8=/qCkL2muhx97F_bLMiSvsloPB0QzwRwLceDW09hAcczc=?refcode=X_112019_TOTVFund_H&amount=250.00&recurring=auto) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/D6-Ta-r1RNiO9lAaK5hW41nEpEOMtSdhLsmCsIQsgM8=/qCkL2muhx97F_bLMiSvsloPB0QzwRwLceDW09hAcczc=?refcode=X_112019_TOTVFund_H&recurring=auto)

The contrast in 2020 could not be clearer -- our nominee is going to take the threat of climate change seriously, support investment in our infrastructure, fight for public education, and defend our healthcare.

**But if swing voters in Arizona only hear from the other party, it won 't matter. **

[**That 's why I need you to support my Turn-Out-The-Vote Fund so we can target our message to the Arizona voters we need -- CHIP IN NOW »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/D6-Ta-r1RNiO9lAaK5hW41nEpEOMtSdhLsmCsIQsgM8=/3X7hOfMkK5UeF1msKSBMeS0Blfy2HI3te8Wao744YVw=?refcode=X_112019_TOTVFund_H&amount=25.00&recurring=auto)

| Team,

Ten Democrats will take the debate stage tonight. Michael has recently polled higher or tied with half of them.

While the DNC continues its attempts to artificially winnow the field by blocking qualified candidates with arbitrary rules, created in back rooms, our campaign is gaining traction in swing states across the country.

We are building this momentum by bringing grassroots supporters like you into the fold. It's the issues that most affect you that inform and shape our campaign.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: The Billionaires... and Bernie and I?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I'll be straight with you: [I'm asking for $5 and your help before midnight because I might not make the next debate stage without you. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Irsquom+asking+for+5+and+your+help+befor&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all") Here's what I've learned: **FIRST:** Billionaire hedge fund manager Tom Steyer sunk $50 million into buying ads to qualify for the next debate **THEN:** Billionaire Michael Bloomberg announced he's going to spend $100 million on digital ads when he jumps into the race. **NOW:** I need your help to fight back -- I'm asking for a wave of support to help me reach the 200,000 unique donor benchmark to qualify for the December Debate. [I didn't have the luxury of growing up a frontrunner. I don't have billions to buy my way on that stage. I am counting on your hard-earned $5 to prove that someone from an immigrant family, who grew up in a poor neighborhood, should have the same shot as a hedge fund owner. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+I+didnrsquot+have+the+luxury+of+growing+&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all") Not only am I rejecting every cent of corporate PAC money... **...But I just learned Bernie and I have the highest percentage of small dollar donors of all the 2020 Presidential candidates.** I'm proud of the campaign I'm running -- We haven't catered to the 1% and the issues that matter only to them. We have tried to be a voice for those who have the least and have been ignored out of political convenience by our leaders: the poor. **I 'm proud of the way my campaign is funded. ** [And if you're proud to be part of this grassroots campaign, I'm humbly asking if you can spare $5 to keep me in this race and get me to the Democratic debates. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+And+if+yoursquore+proud+to+be+part+of+th&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all") Thank you, Julian
---
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8c2/3eb3e2fc/572a0d48/744d7786/397037042/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8c2/3eb3e2fc/572a0d48/744d7785/397037042/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8c2/3eb3e2fc/572a0d48/744d7784/397037042/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8c2/3eb3e2fc/572a0d48/744d7783/397037042/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. I'm proud of the campaign I'm running -- We haven't catered to the 1% and the issues that matter only to them. #
We’re only a few hours away from the Democrat debate in Atlanta. All eyes are on Georgia, because Georgia is ground zero for who wins the White House and Senate in 2020.

We’ve been building up our Rapid Response Fund. But it’s still not where it needs to be for us to compete with the constant attention Democrats receive from the liberal media.

[**Can you rush a donation of ANY AMOUNT right now, before the debate?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=f77e286631&e=02cd889ad3)

| These Democrats are supporting a radical, SOCIALIST agenda. They want higher taxes. They want the $93 TRILLION Green New Deal. They want to take away your health care and replace it with socialized medicine. They want OPEN BORDERS.

**Above all, they want to IMPEACH President Trump and end our Republican Senate majority.**

Each of my opponents here in Georgia are supporting this same extreme agenda. They will do whatever it takes to defeat President Trump and me.

**We must be ready to call out the Democrats’ extreme agenda. We must be ready to fight back against their false attacks. We must send these Democrats a clear message: The road to socialism will NEVER run through Georgia!**

[**If you can, pitch in ANY AMOUNT to our Rapid Response Fund now.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=acbafce6b4&e=02cd889ad3)

Thank you for everything.

David Perdue

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: We can't turn away from this conversation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390946/55b66746/2c93d397/80f1d95/2542439942/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | I was standing in a backyard in Natick, Massachusetts, when one of the gathered neighbors asked a question. Her voice was quiet, trembling a little. _"I have a transgender grandson. And I am terrified for his future."_ Not long ago, I met a trans college student who told me that when she drove home to visit her parents, she knew that there were states in this country were she could be arrested--or worse--just for using the "wrong" bathroom. So she wouldn't eat or drink the day leading up to the drive, to avoid needing a restroom stop. 90 percent of trans people report facing discrimination on the job. Over half say they have been harassed in a public space. **And so far this year, 22 transgender and gender-nonconforming people have been murdered in the United States. 91% were women of color. 81% were under age 30.** This is a national epidemic. And we must pay attention. **On this Transgender Day of Remembrance, we commemorate transgender people, gender nonconforming people, and those perceived to be transgender who have been murdered because of hatred for**** _who they are_****.** In Congress, I serve as the chair of the Transgender Equality Task Force. More than once, I've been asked, "Why do you care about this issue so much?" The answer is simple. Because in America we made a promise that all of us are created equal. We broke that promise the first day of our Republic. We've broken it over and over and over again, in each new era. So it is the fight of every generation to do better, to drive forward to the day when every single person is treated with the humanity and dignity they deserve. As the great poet Emma Lazarus wrote: _Until all of us are free, none of us are free._ [**Head over to Facebook to learn more about the Transgender Day of Remembrance and join the conversation with other folks in our movement.**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390946/55b66746/2c93d397/80f1d96/2542439942/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII/posts/3201965639844977") |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390946/55b66746/2c93d397/80f1d97/2542439942/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? [**Switch to our less email option here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390946/55b66746/2c93d397/80f1d90/2542439942/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). [**Contact us here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390946/55b66746/2c93d397/80f1d92/2542439942/VEsA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/contact/"). |

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We need Congress to pass the Green New Deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hey Peter, Our planet is facing unprecedented climate and environmental change, and governments are doing next to nothing about it. In fact, the Trump administration is undoing environmental regulations and withdrawing the U.S. from the Paris climate agreement, setting this country back decades. We need Congress and the White House to take climate change seriously \-- we need them to stand up, be leaders, and take action to ensure a livable future for our kids and grandkids, not hide their heads in the sand and take money from corporations that are causing the problems. The Green New Deal is one concrete action that they can take, securing clean energy jobs, building community resilience, and reducing our harmful emissions. [**If you agree that Congress needs to pass the Green New Deal today, add your name to ours here. The future cannot be left up to chance, and climate change cannot be ignored any longer. It 's time to do something NOW!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcdb/6e9863e8/16907b14/1db0af4a/944143579/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/greennewdeal/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing with us, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcdb/6e9863e8/16907b14/1db0af4a/944143579/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/greennewdeal/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

Thank you, team! We appreciate everyone who took the time to send Tom personal messages as he prepares to take the debate stage. Your support is so inspiring:

_“Tom, I love your priorities —**climate and the corporate control of government** — and I am rooting for you on the debate stage.” — Tobin, OR_ ————
_“I’m a veteran, 100% service-connected disabled...Please continue to**fight to restore our country** 'politically & environmentally' to **the America I gave my health for.”** — Patrick, GA_ ————
_“Tom, I am**inspired and hopeful** from your messages to the American public. You have my support, and I am so hopeful that **we can change some of the issues** in Washington, D.C.” — Karen, IA_

You have my support, and I am so hopeful that we can change some of the issues in Washington, D.C.” — Karen, IA Tom knows the American people are smart, compassionate, brave, and trustworthy — and these messages really show it. He’s running for president to break the corporate stranglehold on Congress, in order to rebuild a government that is of, by, and for the people. As Tom heads to the stage, can you chip in $1 to show that this team is incredibly strong? We need 200,000 individual donors to make sure his voice is in the next debate, too. subject: We only have a few hours to make history, Yang Gang.

body:
We have just hours left to get to 750,000 donations -- but we can get it done with your help.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3335%2E377263%2EnwK69I) [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17237?t=5&akid=3335%2E377263%2EnwK69I) **With only 5 hours to go, we’re still 4,514 donations short of hitting 750,000 donations by the time Andrew takes the debate stage -- and we need you to chip in immediately to get us there.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17237?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=3335%2E377263%2EnwK69I)

Yang Gang --

We’re extremely proud of the grassroots movement we’ve built together. Not much more than a year ago, we were a handful of people working out of a single office -- and the Yang Gang had only a few hundred members.

**This campaign started with Andrew’s convictions and his Gmail contacts. And with real solutions, a lot of hard work, and you, Yang Gang, we’ve built a movement that is leaving other candidates behind.**

But with just hours left before Andrew takes the debate stage, it looks like, for the first time, we’re going to miss our goal -- 750,000 donations before 9 PM ET tonight.

**Don’t let that happen:[https://act.yang2020.com/go/750K-donations**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ay-email-november?refcode=email-20191120PM-all)

We **cannot** let Andrew take the stage knowing we missed our goal. Time and time again, you’ve stood with us and turned this scrappy campaign into one that’s raised over $15 million. In fact, our campaign has the highest percentage of small-dollar donations of any campaign in the field -- all because of you.

And now we need you to stand with us once again.

**[We only have hours left to hit our 750,000 donation goal. We know we can get it done if you chip in right now.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17237?t=7&akid=3335%2E377263%2EnwK69I)**
[Chip In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17237?t=6&akid=3335%2E377263%2EnwK69I)
---
Thanks for everything you do,

Yang2020
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Chip In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17237?t=14&akid=3335%2E377263%2EnwK69I)
---

name: Bill Olson
subject: Bill Olson for Congress——Event Calendar Coordinator
body:
The impeachment of the President is at a fever pitch! Democrats will say anything and everything in order to damage the President.. We cannot allow their slander to go unchallenged.
If you’re receiving this email that means that you have visited my website and expressed interest in helping out the Bill Olson for Congress campaign. I am very grateful for your initiative. There’s going to be plenty of long days and nights ahead, but, it will be all worth it in November 2020 when we send Congressman Darren Soto back home to Celebration , permanently!

There are going to be many assorted ways to help out. But, I am looking for a very special volunteer to be a charter member of my staff. The position is:

Name: Event Calendar Coordinator
Position type: Volunteer
Duties:
• Identify and solicit potential events, and partnerships for Candidate Bill Olson to attend in order to generate completed ballot petitions and candidate visibility. – At this point we have been mostly using Facebook events and Eventbright to prospect possible opportunities.
* Maintain an accurate database of campaign events, including venue information, activities scheduled and executed, notes regarding challenges, sales hints, inside stories, etc. along with seasonal dates, past performance, etc.
* Maintain the candidate events schedule and calendar.
* Communicate event information with internal and external partners to successfully execute event.

Desired Qualifications:
* Education & Experience: High school diploma; any equivalent combination of education and experience in a related field.
* Computer Skills: Basic skills with Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, and Outlook);Ability to set up a Gmail account on your personal mobile device.

Work environment:
This is a work from home position. The amount of hours spent volunteering will be dependent upon your ability to fill the campaign calendar.

If you are interested in this position please give me a call at 407-276-3640 or email me at billolson4FL9th@gmail.com.

Look out for more position postings in the coming days.

Bill Olson for Congress 2020
www.billolsonFL.com
407-276-3640

Sent from my iPad

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: What should our next Democratic president focus on first?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cbb0/6cd27893/52ee2822/15879e42/1182158642/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Just like you, I'm watching the presidential race with keen interest. Tonight's debate will be another critical moment. After we defeat Donald Trump, we'll have so much to do to get America back on track. **Here's my question for you: What's your highest priority for our next president?** _Reforming and expanding health care?_ _Reducing gun violence?_ _Taking on the climate crisis?_ _Ending corruption and fixing our campaign finance system?_ _Nominating progressive judges?_ Of course, all these issues (and many others) are critical.**So write back and tell me: What's the one thing we must do first when Democrats win the White House?** _Jeff_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cbb0/6cd27893/52ee2822/15879e43/1182158642/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-11-19-talkback&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cbb0/6cd27893/52ee2822/15879e40/1182158642/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-11-19-talkback&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cbb0/6cd27893/52ee2822/15879e41/1182158642/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-11-19-talkback&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cbb0/6cd27893/52ee2822/15879e7e/1182158642/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-11-19-talkback&refcode2=express-buttons")

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu4DJK_N9L5MLRAPFDf33eco&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191120_s&n=4)
Have you been keeping up with impeachment? Not only has President Trump been busy tampering with witness testimony, he’s even suggesting that he wants to testify before Congress!
We won’t hold our breath — President Trump will never voluntarily agree to answer questions under oath.
[**But on the off chance he WANTS to talk about impeachment, forget written testimony, Mr. President! Answer these questions on the debate stage!**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-sBpUTu90oG7y7sfok76u2ZevSEEdM5WZsy31i69hI8JrB7xurc5bor8A3E6z0fL&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191120_s&n=5)
---
[**_Should President Trump debate Bill?
_**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-sBpUTu90oG7y7sfok76u2ZevSEEdM5WZsy31i69hI8JrB7xurc5bor8A3E6z0fL&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191120_s&n=6)
| | [YES ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-sBpUTu90oG7y7sfok76u2ZevSEEdM5WZsy31i69hI8JrB7xurc5bor8A3E6z0fL&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191120_s&n=7)
---
**It’s clear that the Republican Party and President Trump are afraid to stand behind their conduct and make their case to the American people.** They’d rather continue to cancel primaries and caucuses, refuse to hold any presidential debates, and hope that nobody notices that **_this is not normal_****.**
**We believe the American people deserve to hear from** **_all_** **of the Republican candidates for president. Truth matters, and we want to know that you’ll support us in this fight.**
[**Will you join us and call on President Trump to debate Bill on the issues?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-sBpUTu90oG7y7sfok76u2ZevSEEdM5WZsy31i69hI-HWDQBSQZzko-WY8zW7F-Z1C9o295TLS8D2BO_Q93Jrg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191120_s&n=8)
---
[**_Should President Trump debate Bill?
_**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-sBpUTu90oG7y7sfok76u2ZevSEEdM5WZsy31i69hI8JrB7xurc5bor8A3E6z0fL&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191120_s&n=9)
| | [YES ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=-sBpUTu90oG7y7sfok76u2ZevSEEdM5WZsy31i69hI8JrB7xurc5bor8A3E6z0fL&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191120_s&n=10)
---
— Natalie
_Natalie Cookson_
_Chief of Staff_
_Weld 2020_

body:
Today marks two years since Cory Gardner last held a town hall with the people he was sent to Washington to represent. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377145f/691c9bd/6f98a6ce/11a7e598/2845180402/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

**November 20, 2017**

That was the last time Cory Gardner held a town hall with his constituents.

That's right. Somehow, Cory Gardner has managed to go two whole years (that's _730 days_) without facing the people he was sent to Washington to represent.

It's a shame, because town halls are a great forum for constituents to get to know their elected officials--they give us the opportunity to ask questions, and discuss the policies that affect every one of us.

But how can Gardner claim to represent Coloradans if he isn't even taking the time to speak with us?

[**_Cory Gardner is absent and invisible --but John has pledged to hold regular town halls if he's elected as our next Senator. Will you chip in whatever you can and help send him to Washington?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191120_MES_20191120-fr-MES-townhall-2mo_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191120_MES_20191120-fr-MES-townhall-2mo_2mo_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191120_MES_20191120-fr-MES-townhall-2mo_2mo_expresslaneother&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you,

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8c3/3eb3e2fc/57317da8/744d7105/2471683498/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8c3/3eb3e2fc/57317da8/744d7104/2471683498/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b3_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8c3/3eb3e2fc/57317da8/744d7103/2471683498/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b3_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper. Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

| Friend— Are you watching this debate!? **Just now** on the presidential debate stage in Atlanta, Kamala Harris had the audacity to go after Tulsi for... _daring to go on Fox News during the Obama administration_. Harris displayed the lack of vision, leadership and foresight to declare that only those who toe the line of the Democratic establishment and refuse to speak to Americans they consider “deplorables” are allowed to be crowned the Democratic nominee. **She’s out of touch.** Kamala Harris may have a fancy slogan that says she’s “for the people” but she’s clearly for the few. The elite. The DC establishment and the tired status quo. Tulsi scares her, because we’re not playing by these undemocratic rules. We’re a movement of Americans who are reaching beyond party lines, to problem solve and tackle the challenges of our time. **Tulsi can beat Trump in 2020 and here’s why:** Her message for the people is resonating with Americans who feel left behind by our divisive political climate, and the corrupt corporate media in the pocket of the military industrial complex. The fact that Tulsi can go on Fox News, CNN, NBC and Joe Rogan in one week is not something to apologize for, it’s necessary in order to speak to all Americans. It’s patriotism that drove Tulsi to serve and it’s patriotism that unites us all in this moment. [**Will you show Tulsi you’re with her? Rush $25 right now to stand with Tulsi against establishment smears.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12067973/123675861/-1498992723?refcode=em191120_ask&amount=25&refcode2=2c5baf9a-110c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzViYWY5YS0xMTBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XIRag05APjFfYBW-E7kEsKLYfuPg6tVag9mHK1RczkE=) | [DONATE $25 » ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12067982/123675870/-102859486?refcode=em191120_button2&amount=25&refcode2=2c5baf9a-110c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzViYWY5YS0xMTBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XIRag05APjFfYBW-E7kEsKLYfuPg6tVag9mHK1RczkE= "Donate $25")

subject: Nancy Pelosi: "I will make sure [Trump] does not intimidate the whistleblower"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | Hello Peter, Nancy Pelosi, in an interview with _Face the Nation_ , made it clear that she is taking Trump's intimidation of the whistleblower and other witnesses very seriously. She also said, "I think part of it is his own insecurity as an impostor." We couldn't have said it better. But with Trump in full-on attack mode against the House Leader, belittling San Francisco and throwing millions in dark money behind defeating her majority, we need to hear what Democratic voters think: **Do you support Nancy Pelosi?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcdf/6e9863e8/168d8834/1db0ae6f/1278660988/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/XN5P3XD9") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcdf/6e9863e8/168d8834/1db0ae6f/1278660988/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/XN5P3XD9") Thank you so much for your input \-- with the rapidly changing political landscape, hearing from engaged voters is incredibly important as we plan our strategy to take back the Senate and the White House in 2020. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcdf/6e9863e8/168d8834/1db0ae73/1278660988/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191120d.ND-b&refcode2=SuwzCGU3Bu2ZlVlr4Xs6")

name: Laura Loomer
subject: The alleged “Whistleblower” is Eric Ciaramella
body:
We’re all outraged by the Democrats farce impeachment hearings that are going on now.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354113-825136-4725090-385dce4083-8f2515c702)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354113-825136-4725089-60c95da7d9-8f2515c702) We’re all outraged by the Democrats farce impeachment hearings that are going on now.

They are twisting every little thing they can for political advantage.

That’s evident by this one thing: hiding the whistleblower.

Eric Ciaramella has been identified as the alleged “whistleblower” against Donald Trump.

Adam Schiff has cited and defended Ciaramella’s right to anonymity with whistleblower protections, but it’s all junk.

**Ciaramella isn't a whistleblower.** He's at best a second-party witness in the impeachment process that's a CRIMINAL PROCEEDING.

Have you ever seen a witness take the stand with a bag over his or her head?

Nope, because the Sixth Amendment of our Constitution doesn’t allow it in criminal proceedings. We have the RIGHT to face our accusers.

**Amendment VI: “In all criminal prosecutions, the accused shall enjoy the right . . . to be confronted with the witnesses against him.”**
Schiff and the Democrats won’t bring Ciaramella forward as the evidence is clear that he's nothing but an Obama holdover and anti-Trump operative being paid by our tax dollars.

[**Tell Schiff to abide by the Constitution and bring forward their witness against President Trump, so the truth can come out!**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354113-825136-4725089-60c95da7d9-8f2515c702)

After you do, help me stop the next impeachment by sending me to Washington. Support my campaign as we close out November strong and send a message to Schiff, Pelosi, and the other radical Democrats that we've had enough of this farce!

Thank you again for all that you do, and please [**send that message to Adam Schiff today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354113-825136-4725089-60c95da7d9-8f2515c702).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. Democrats have initiated a criminal proceeding against President Trump yet are refusing to allow him to face his accuser, hiding the “Whistleblower” behind the curtain. Our Constitution gives us the right to face our accusers. [**Tell Adam Schiff that today!**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354113-825136-4725089-60c95da7d9-8f2515c702)

And even though Sen. But with each month, it becomes even more important that we keep hitting our goals. Sen. Cornyn will have more and more money from corporate PACs and the powerful DC special interests pouring into his campaign, and we have to be prepared to fight back.

**We don 't need them, because we've got you.** But we have to hit this goal.

Leah

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Today a debate, tomorrow a voter purge we can stop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Tonight, we want to hear from the candidates about free and fair elections. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa556/34a064cc/1b07f691/70369a7/1750822238/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - the next presidential primary debate is tonight right here in Georgia. But, at every debate so far, there has been no question asked about one of our nation's most pressing issues: **the right to free and fair elections.** We need to hear from candidates about voting rights, especially here in Georgia where Brad Raffensperger and Brian Kemp plan to purge more than 300,000 voters from the rolls next month. **We can 't allow Republicans to do further damage; we have to act, and that's why we created Fair Fight, so we can address these problems head on. But we can't do it alone.** [**Join us today and make a donation of any amount to help us fight to protect voting rights not just in Georgia but across the country.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa556/34a064cc/1b07f691/70369a4/1750822238/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTIwMTlERDMtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE112019DD3-1-a") **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa556/34a064cc/1b07f691/70369a4/1750822238/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTIwMTlERDMtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE112019DD3-1-a")** We know that this work has to start now. Not when our right to vote is taken away or made more difficult to exercise.We know that this work has to start now. Not when our right to vote is taken away or made more difficult to exercise. Thank you in advance for joining the fight, \- Team Fair Fight **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa556/34a064cc/1b07f691/70369a4/1750822238/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTIwMTlERDMtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE112019DD3-1-a")**

clean_body: Tonight, we want to hear from the candidates about free and fair elections. | "" | | | Friend - the next presidential primary debate is tonight right here in Georgia. But, at every debate so far, there has been no question asked about one of our nation's most pressing issues: the right to free and fair elections. We need to hear from candidates about voting rights, especially here in Georgia where Brad Raffensperger and Brian Kemp plan to purge more than 300,000 voters from the rolls next month. We can 't allow Republicans to do further damage; we have to act, and that's why we created Fair Fight, so we can address these problems head on. But we can't do it alone. "" "" We know that this work has to start now. Not when our right to vote is taken away or made more difficult to exercise.We know that this work has to start now. Not when our right to vote is taken away or made more difficult to exercise. Thank you in advance for joining the fight, \- Team Fair Fight "" | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2019 Fair Fight PAC, All rights reserved Contributions to Fair Fight PAC are not tax-deductible. That's why we're bringing back a chance to be on our Grassroots Donor Wall -- because our supporters are crucial to this movement, and we can't thank them enough.

Friend,

Here’s the bottom line — you shouldn’t be opening political fundraising emails or even looking at your email inbox on Thanksgiving.

Thanksgiving is a time for family, cranberry sauce, and watching hours of football. The holiday gives Hoosiers a break from the normal hustle and bustle of everyday life and lets them reflect on what’s most important in their lives.
[ **Pledge a contribution** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ac8343b805464d45925a1c33651c24a7&_e=d7G91UUctrqTUL-84g313izszslgCOt9haisyfp-iH2jMEnvuumsKUs0kR8ptMx6HnROmJp8yGXHeO9bTUPtWexM_WFLKk1e2QXenlCdTxkL4buk8s8oLammq0JyOme_jBPFb1lqGVJK9WSxEGHRJ6ysIM8KYqpFEpIkqqAhnN5D6EYxL9DNJdH9wfTUSNpMvW-g6pmuoQZwkVCY4jpc0mvdO1AX75jK02WAygwB_RsRrsb3DjhuNcQpTtqlQ-lpsj2rDaTktFky0SLVjO23ThturdHS64vMk_0eQoacoWpAenPV3dcjg4jzNclgiSkav4Mm17KsEJcM2IeFA3TorzNrjHSBRXlC8DM0FmomDNdTpDLQsBupmwiUVmIyMM8-0pyTk9Bv8qUUGGxqhcMN913BaPVMharU9zgKwyDS8Kk%3D)
That’s why we’re emailing you now and asking you to pledge a donation that kicks in at the end of November, instead of reaching out at the end of the month.

**[If you have a moment today, please consider chipping in whatever you can and pledging a donation toward our end-of-month deadline — every dollar makes a huge difference for us.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ac8343b805464d45925a1c33651c24a7&_e=d7G91UUctrqTUL-84g313izszslgCOt9haisyfp-iH2jMEnvuumsKUs0kR8ptMx6HnROmJp8yGXHeO9bTUPtWexM_WFLKk1e2QXenlCdTxkL4buk8s8oLammq0JyOme_jBPFb1lqGVJK9WSxEGHRJ6ysIM8KYqpFEpIkqqAhnN5D6EYxL9DNJdH9wfTUSNpMvW-g6pmuoQZwkVCY4jpc0udLlcm0I6-NJMi2X8Nr-atHKUl5Bsasws41RswLrGFtKgfWkwxe7uEUkljTaNFlBb7rSjxHKk406eRHy1KXItZa4vFhcssX6h5kqPIAwG1-I0Dsw7s3H4vJTnoYQDuHpCy9C1KMPb6XIN4bV8I1Z5je84Sofyp4DSTt_Buym2goVqP1i3pz99zQPvTJnInacDT1Upwrum9tleJhg7qjEqQ%3D)**
[ **Pledge a contribution** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ac8343b805464d45925a1c33651c24a7&_e=d7G91UUctrqTUL-84g313izszslgCOt9haisyfp-iH2jMEnvuumsKUs0kR8ptMx6HnROmJp8yGXHeO9bTUPtWexM_WFLKk1e2QXenlCdTxkL4buk8s8oLammq0JyOme_jBPFb1lqGVJK9WSxEGHRJ6ysIM8KYqpFEpIkqqAhnN5D6EYxL9DNJdH9wfTUSNpMvW-g6pmuoQZwkVCY4jpc0lG7Q1LqDb4PrVK-TO_ZXk_z_AaNyK6w3FckvtM4kx1fmMk4UEjbrAXzVjlR4RHPMLfU_-KFAf2OipSurZZ_205LwgBnMeVyF3fAOXRE5rdGUef-0KPRUs4lRyDEmRuLRmNizy-vR88iSXZc3dV-dysdaFh6f0wFtRM4-k4oRLI8DvEP2caJe_fCxX9t48Wl0cmRRKsFcAEXAOgu1noDzYw%3D)
